A century later, Coleman's current catalog features a wide-ranging array of products that make spending time outside a pleasure. The company crafts coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days, airbeds that are comfortable and won't deflate during the night, a complete line of bright and long-lasting LED lights, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and more. REVIEW: I purchased this product solely to use as a pool toy inflator as advertised on the Coleman Web Site which says "Quickly inflate or deflate virtually any airbed or inflatable". I realize this is meant primarily to be used for inflatable beds, but it does come with an adapter (the pointy one with the loop on the end) that is supposed to be used for other inflatables. I have an attachment that attaches to our shop vac that is supposed to be used for inflating pool toys, but it is bulky, and difficult to use. Unfortunately, the adapter on this Coleman Pump isn't any better and does not easily fit into any pool toys that I have, and I have many different sizes and shapes. It barely fit into the largest ones that I had, and when it did, it didn't do a very good job of inflating the pool toy at all. It was slow, weak, and extremely loud. The nozzle and loop is supposed to be used to open the stop valve in the pool toy, but the nozzle was so big, it wouldn't get in there far enough to make an airway. Unfortunately, they don't offer any smaller adapters. Overall, this product might be OK at inflating a bed, but as for other inflatables that they advertise about, this isn't the product to do it. Very Disappointing.

data.title: Coleman Self-Inflating Camping Pad with Pillow
data.description: Enjoy additional support and cushioning with the Coleman Self-Inflating Camping Pad with Pillow. This camping sleeping pad features a comfy tufted design that adds an extra layer of padding between your sleeping bag and the ground. Equipped with a free-flow valve, the sleeping pad self-inflates with no air pump needed. Simply roll it out and open the valve, and the pad will begin inflating. When it's time to pack up, reopen the valve and push the air out using the compression straps. Thanks to its durable, weather-resistant polyester shell, this camping sleeping pad can endure night after night of use.
data.reviewText: This pad looks good when it blows up automatically. It is hard to roll it back. Also the straps and very poorly designed when rolling it back to original shape. The strap broke from the first use. Did not work for me.

data.title: Coleman Camp Propane Grill/Stove+
data.description: The Coleman Camp Propane Grill/Stove+ offers both a grill and a stove for versatile campsite cooking. This durable steel-crafted outdoor appliance has a stove surface that fits a 10-inch pan as well as a 130-square inch grill area, letting you saut veggies while you're grilling chicken, or get the soup going while you're cooking up burgers. Each surface has independent temperature controls to give you precise control. The InstaStart push-button ignition powers up the portable grill with a simple press of a button with no matches needed, while integrated Wind Block panels help shield the flame from wind and can be folded down on calm days to be used as side tables. This outdoor grill features PerfectFlow pressure control technology to keep the heat steady even in extreme conditions and PerfectHeat technology for more efficient cooking with less fuel. An aluminized steel cooktop offers durable use and is rust resistant, and the removable grates and grease management tray offer simple and quick cleanup. The Coleman Camp Propane Grill/Stove+ can run for up to one hour with both burners on high setting on one 16.4-ounce propane cylinder (sold separately) and produces 20,000 total BTUs of cooking power.
data.reviewText: I had high expectations for this grill. Yes, it did heat up things fast. The drawback is that the legs are only an inch tall. Which means if the table you are using is not a heat resistant surface,it will ruin your table. Second, there is no high cover you can purchase, if you want to grill something like,corn, or other meat that you want to cook longer, you cannot. Because the cover is about an inch high only. I just wish there is a cover I can buy for the grill side.

data.title: Coleman Rainfly Accessory for 6-Person Instant Tent
data.description:
Get better airflow with the Coleman Rainfly Accessory for 6-Person Instant Tent. This rainfly for the Coleman 6-Person Instant Tent, 10 x 9, allows you to crack your windows during a downpour and still stay dry. Get better airflow when camping in your Coleman Instant six-person tent with this Instant tent rainfly. Coleman tents are well sealed and protected from the rain, so campers sometime lose airflow when it starts to pour. Designed for Coleman's 10-by-9-foot Instant tents, the rainfly not only provides added protection from the weather, but it also allows you to crack your windows during a storm and still stay dry. Plus, the rainfly creates a spacious vestibule outside--perfect for stowing shoes and other gear.

data.title: Coleman Family Sized Classic LED Lantern
data.description: With the Coleman Family-Sized Classic LED Lantern, bigger really is brighter: the lantern is perfect for lighting up a campsite, backyard entertaining, and emergency use. With Coleman's interchangeable CPX 6 system, you can choose your power: insert 4 D batteries (not included) into the battery cartridge, or upgrade by purchasing the CPX rechargeable power pack and make your lantern a rechargeable deviceand use either option interchangeably with any Coleman CPX 6 device! The Family-Sized LED Lantern features a super-bright high-intensity LED that never needs to be replaced, with a diffuser tube for a perfect beam pattern and reduced glare. On the Low setting, it runs for up to 50 hours, and on High for up to 25 hours. The Coleman LED Lantern is weather-resistant, so it's a reliable choice to withstand the elements. The wire bail handle is convenient for carrying or hanging the lantern wherever you need it.

data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent

DESCRIPTION:
Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.

REVIEW:
this tent, though it's very spacious sucks. it was leaking on the first use. I woke up one morning flitting in a pool of water.

data.title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
data.description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
data.reviewText: As far as grill quality goes, don't expect much. The cooking is uneven. But it's very portable and good for camping.

data.title: Coleman Micro Packer LED Lantern, 100 L
data.description: Grab a lantern and a flashlight in the palm of your hand with the Coleman MicroPacker LED Lantern. The bright, 2-in-1 design snaps from area lighting to directional lighting quite literally in a snap. The bright LED lasts a lifetime, so it never needs to be replaced. The versatile light lasts up to 92 hours, and an extremely lightweight design is only 6 oz.-even with the three AA-cell batteries that power the lantern.
data.reviewText: I have used this camping a few times now and it does a decent job of producing light for our tent.  I suggest reading all the specs as this is much smaller than I anticipated.  I bought one of the old version too and this is brighter (non-scientific based on trying to read using each to measure light).  You would not want to rely on this for camp site light.  For what you get and the price this is okay and I'm happy with my purchase 3.5 stars.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Micro Packer LED Lantern, 100 L

DESCRIPTION:
Grab a lantern and a flashlight in the palm of your hand with the Coleman MicroPacker LED Lantern. The bright, 2-in-1 design snaps from area lighting to directional lighting quite literally in a snap. The bright LED lasts a lifetime, so it never needs to be replaced. The versatile light lasts up to 92 hours, and an extremely lightweight design is only 6 oz.-even with the three AA-cell batteries that power the lantern.

REVIEW:
I have used this camping a few times now and it does a decent job of producing light for our tent.  I suggest reading all the specs as this is much smaller than I anticipated.  I bought one of the old version too and this is brighter (non-scientific based on trying to read using each to measure light).  You would not want to rely on this for camp site light.  For what you get and the price this is okay and I'm happy with my purchase 3.5 stars.

data.title: Coleman QuickPack Deluxe Propane Lantern
data.description: Make packing up your lantern as easy as possible with the Coleman QuickPack Deluxe Propane Lantern. The 2-mantle design of this lantern creates a steady, bright glow of up to 1000 lumens of light that reaches up to 22 meters away. A quick match strike is all you need to get your lantern started, then simply dial in the perfect brightness with the adjustable control knob. Once your lantern is lit, the wide base provides stability when placed on a table, and the bail handle allows for easy hanging. No matter where you go, the PerfectFlow pressure-control technology produces a steady fuel stream and consistent performance in all kinds of weather. When you're ready to head home, the QuickPack storage system helps get you on your way quickly, since the lantern base is also the bottom of your case. Just place the outer cover and you're all packed up until you're ready for your next bright adventure.
data.reviewText: It was a bait and switch game I ordered the one with the igniter and I got the lower grade where I have to use matches instead  it sucks

data.title: Coleman 42-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner & Wheels
data.description: The Coleman 42-Can Wheeled Soft Cooler goes with you to the campsite, the BBQ, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It features durable wheels and a retractable handle, so it's easy and comfortable to transport to wherever the party is. The cooler is big enough to hold 42 cans, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! The cooler is soft on the outside and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect the contents from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
data.reviewText: Mediocre construction, but most of all, much smaller than anticipated. I don't know what is meant by 42 cans, but  I would suggest two six packs of soda or beer would be about max here. I wanted capacity as advertised. Not even close. And thus, it returns! - )

data.title: Coleman 2-Gallon Party Stacker Jug
data.description: Keep quenched in fun, space-saving style with a Coleman 2 Gallon Party Stacker Jug. The unique stacking design offers vertical storage and use, while its two-gallon capacity is perfect for school parties and family functions. You can even use different colored jugs for different drinks so serving and filling is fast and fun. The removable spigot is easy to clean, and the large bail handle makes carrying easy.Brand: ColemanModel: 3000000736Color: BlueMaterials: PlasticDimensions: 7 inches long x 8 inches wide x 9 inches highConvenient stackable design for multiple beveragesSecure storage and easy-to-clean spigotThis item is not able to be shipped internationally or to a freight forwarding address.
data.reviewText:
I bought this one because I liked how it was designed. It's wider and shorter comparing to other 2 gallon containers and it looks very sturdy. It also has a replaceable faucet so I figured that would be a good thing if it broke for some reason. It's also stackable which is nice and the top is flat so you can put other things on top of it and they don't fall off.
However, it started to leak after just one use. Not a terrible leak, just a drop every once in a while from the faucet area. It's not a big deal but still if you drive for 1-2 hours with this in your trunk, the trunk will get wet.
I went to replace it but on the way to the customer service counter with the new unit I realized that the new one is broken. that's when I decided I should probably get a different model...
Coleman is considered by many a leading brand in outdoor equipment and specifically in coolers. I was really surprised that they came up with a low quality product like this one.

data.title: Coleman Steel Creek Fast Pitch Dome Tent with Screen Room, 6-Person
data.description: Enjoy the great outdoors in total comfort with the Coleman Steel Creek Fast Pitch 6-Person Dome Tent. This spacious camping tent features a separate screen room, which offers a comfortable place to lounge while sealing out bugs, debris, and other nuisances. With its full floor, the screen room also provides extra sleeping space on warmer nights. Thanks to Fast Pitch system and snag-free Insta-Clip suspension, this fast pitch tent assembles 50 percent quicker than similar Coleman tents with a conventional setup. The WeatherTec system helps seal out water to keep you and your gear dry, while the included rainfly offers extra protection against rugged weather conditions. With its spacious interior, this dome tent offers enough room for two queen-sized air beds. Illumiline reflective guy lines offer greater visibility at night, so you won't accidentally trip in the dark. And when it's finally time to pack up, the 6-person tent fits neatly inside the expandable carry bag for easy storage and transportation. A range of other convenient amenities--including storage pockets, window awnings, and an E-port for routing electrical power--round out this fully-featured camping tent.
data.reviewText: Front zipper as you raise it goes away from you so you need to lean over to get fully zipped up.

data.title: Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
data.description: The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It holds 16 cans inside, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! Sporting an adjustable shoulder strap, the cooler is soft on the outside for comfortable carrying, and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect your food from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides antimicrobial protection, to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
data.reviewText: I tried it during my camping trip last weekend. I did a decent job keeping things cool. But it is not a YETI or RTIC by any means. Don't expect it to keep your ice for more than a few hours. Good for day trips.

data.title: Coleman 70 Quart Xtreme 5 Cooler
data.description: Keep your food and drinks cold for an extended time, and make the fun last longer, when you bring a Coleman 70 Quart Xtreme 5 Cooler. Xtreme technology uses an insulated lid and extra insulation in the walls to keep your items cold for up to 5 days. Large enough to hold 98 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on a long weekend camping trip, a roadtrip, or out to a BBQ, the 2-way handles make getting to your destination easy. Once you arrive, the cup holders molded into the lid will keep your cold drink close while you enjoy the day. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. The Coleman 50-Quart Xtreme Cooler is the ideal traveling companion. The large icy blue cooler and white lid are lined with a full two full inches of insulation and the hinged lid also features a secure and tight gasket seal, ensuring that your cooler will keep food and beverages chilled for up to five days at temperatures of up to 90 degrees. Holding up to 98 beverage cans with ice, this cooler features two-way handles for easy lift and maneuvering in tight spaces, and the sump-lined drain promises easy clean-up and no-tilt draining--a plus for this large capacity cooler. This models lid can be fitted with 24-inch cords (not included) for additional dry storage--lawn chairs, beach towels, picnic blankets, etc.--on top. The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
data.reviewText:
It's a typical coleman cooler.  Plastic and and works good.  I've owned a few and they work great.  I put two bags of ice and lots of drinks in the cooler the day we got it.  5 days later there was still some ice.  Have not had it out camping yet and that will be the real test.  I'll update then.

UPDATE:  Second campout and it leaks and the handel came off.  JUNK!  JUNK!  JUNK!

Not worth $10 in my opinion.

data.title: Coleman CPX 4.5 LED Tent Light
data.description: The CPX 4.5 LED Tent Light by Coleman is compatible with any tent and even attaches to the tent wall allowing you to pivot the light where you need it. The CPX system lets you choose your power: three AAA cell batteries (included) or one CPX 4.5 rechargeable power cartridge (sold separately - Campmor item #84089). The battery meter changes from yellow to red as battery life is depleted.Magnetically attaches to any tent or metal surface.No tools required.Water resistant.Lifetime of light - LEDs don't need to be replaced.LED battery meter, changes color when battery power is low.Three light modes, white light on high or low and a low power amber nightlight.Size: W 2.75", H 5".Weight: 0.59 oz..
data.reviewText: I used it for first time last weekend. Not a bad little light, as some problems there are difficulties turning it on and off. You need to hold it and it's difficult to figure out which knob turns it off (or is it the one the batteries come out of). Good enought to play card with in the tent, but wouldn't want to have to try and read by it, just not bright enough. The light will drop if you knock it hard, magnet isn't that big.. overall, worth while for what it's intended for.

data.title: Coleman Cabin Tent with Instant Setup | Cabin Tent for Camping Sets Up in 60 Seconds
data.description: The Coleman Instant Cabin makes getting camp set up quicker and easier than ever. This instant tent has pre-attached poles that make setting up camp as simple as unfolding, extending, and securing. You can assemble the tent in about a minute and then get started on your adventure. This camping tent is designed with the WeatherTec system that features patented welded floors and inverted seams to help ensure you stay dry if it starts to rain. An integrated vented rainfly offers added protection from the rain and improves airflow without the need for extra assembly. This backpacking tent is made from rugged Polyguard 2X double-thick fabric that stands up to the rigors of the outdoors, so you can use it reliably season after season. This 6-person tent offers enough room for two queen size air beds and comes with integrated storage pockets to help you keep small items organized. And when its time to go home, the camping tent packs away securely in the included expandable carry bag that lets you tear away the rip strip for easy packing.
data.reviewText: Great tent! Easy set up and tear down.
data.text:

Coleman Cabin Tent with Instant Setup | Cabin Tent for Camping Sets Up in 60 Seconds

DESCRIPTION:
The Coleman Instant Cabin makes getting camp set up quicker and easier than ever. This instant tent has pre-attached poles that make setting up camp as simple as unfolding, extending, and securing. You can assemble the tent in about a minute and then get started on your adventure. This camping tent is designed with the WeatherTec system that features patented welded floors and inverted seams to help ensure you stay dry if it starts to rain. An integrated vented rainfly offers added protection from the rain and improves airflow without the need for extra assembly. This backpacking tent is made from rugged Polyguard 2X double-thick fabric that stands up to the rigors of the outdoors, so you can use it reliably season after season. This 6-person tent offers enough room for two queen size air beds and comes with integrated storage pockets to help you keep small items organized. And when its time to go home, the camping tent packs away securely in the included expandable carry bag that lets you tear away the rip strip for easy packing.

data.title: Coleman Camper’s Toilet Paper, 3 Rolls
data.description: Take an everyday hygiene necessity on camping trips with Coleman Campers Toilet Paper. Includes 3 rolls of biodegradable, septic-safe 2-ply toilet paper that easily fits in any camping backpack. data.title: Coleman Stratus Adult Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner
data.description:
The Coleman Stratus Adult Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner doubles as both a warm, cozy liner and a low-profile sleeping bag. On its own, the liner can keep you warm in temperatures as low as 50 degrees Fahrenheit. When placed inside another sleeping bag, it can provide 12 degrees Fahrenheit of extra thermal protection. This low-profile sleeping bag liner features a two-way patented ZipPlow zipper system that plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. It also features an elastic storage strap and stuff sack for easy packing and transport. The Stratus Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner can accommodate most people up to 5 feet 11 inches in height. It is machine washable for easy cleaning. The Coleman 8197C410 Stratus Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner is the perfect accompaniment to any sleeping bag, especially when you are camping where you are not sure how cold it is going to be. This sleeping-bag liner is full-size, measuring 33-inches by 75-inches, and fits most full-size sleeping bags up to 5-feet 11-inches long. When used with a sleeping bag, this liner adds 12 degrees of thermal protection, making a 35-degree sleeping bag usable at temperatures as low as 23 degrees! The Coleman fleece sleeping-bag liner is commercial-machine-washable only and comes with its own stuff sack. Manufacturer Warranty
Five-year warranty
data.reviewText: It arrived, I tried to unzip it, the zipper WOULD NOT MOVE AN INCH. Correction; not a millimeter. Even had another person try to pull it while I held the bag - nothing. I've never seen anything like it, it's like the zipper is welded in place. Extremely disappointing for a Coleman product, was forced to return it immediately.

data.title: Coleman CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge
data.description: Power all your Coleman CPX 6 gear with the Coleman CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge. This rechargeable battery kit allows you to make any Coleman CPX 6 product rechargeable, helping you save money on disposable batteries and minimize waste in landfills. Each kit includes a rechargeable battery, a 12-volt adapter for convenient vehicle recharging, and a 120-volt adapter for use with conventional AC outlets. Built to resist impacts and water, the battery features a rugged design and comes fitted with a rubber plug to protect against dirt and debris. It recharges quickly via either a vehicle or home outlet. And thanks to the power cartridge's charge indicator, you'll know exactly when the battery is fully charged.
data.reviewText: The charge does not last as long as I would like.  It is great for a weekend or over-night trip.  I need a device for a week in the Rockies, so I don't think this will suffice.  I found a solar device that may do the trick.  I'll let you know.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge

DESCRIPTION:
Power all your Coleman CPX 6 gear with the Coleman CPX 6 Rechargeable Power Cartridge. This rechargeable battery kit allows you to make any Coleman CPX 6 product rechargeable, helping you save money on disposable batteries and minimize waste in landfills. Each kit includes a rechargeable battery, a 12-volt adapter for convenient vehicle recharging, and a 120-volt adapter for use with conventional AC outlets. Built to resist impacts and water, the battery features a rugged design and comes fitted with a rubber plug to protect against dirt and debris. It recharges quickly via either a vehicle or home outlet. And thanks to the power cartridge's charge indicator, you'll know exactly when the battery is fully charged.

REVIEW:
The charge does not last as long as I would like.  It is great for a weekend or over-night trip.  I need a device for a week in the Rockies, so I don't think this will suffice.  I found a solar device that may do the trick.  I'll let you know.

data.title: Coleman Dunnock Cold Weather Adult Sleeping Bag
data.description: Ideal for camping at higher altitudes or in cooler months, the Coleman Dunnock Cold-Weather Sleeping Bag helps you sleep comfortably in temperatures as low as 20F. This sleeping bag features Fiberlock construction that keeps the insulation from shifting, reducing cold spots and increasing durability. A cotton cover and ultra-soft cotton flannel liner also keep you warm, as well as a Thermolock draft tube that prevents heat loss through the zipper. The bottom of the bag unzips to provide extra ventilation on warmer nights. The 2-way patented ZipPlow system plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. Plus, the Roll Control design and Wrap 'N' Roll integrated packing system make this lightweight backpacking sleeping bag easy to roll and pack. This sleeping bag has a spacious design that can accommodate most people up to 5 feet 11 inches tall and is machine washable for easy cleaning.
data.reviewText:
Good size.
But it seemed to be damaged. The fill material did not seem enought. For me not comfortable at all. It semed the bag was not filled properly.

data.title: Coleman Bottle Top Propane Stove,Green,6.62" H x 7.81" W x 7.75" L
data.description:
Need a lightweight outdoor stove for backpacking, hunting, or camping? Look no further than the Coleman Portable Bottle-Top Propane Stove, which fits up to an 8-inch pan above a fully adjustable burner for precise temperature control and up to 10,000 BTUs of cooking power. Brew coffee, heat up hot dogs, and so on, knowing you can enjoy up to 2.5 hours of cooking on just one 16.4 oz. propane cylinder (sold separately). PerfectFlow technology keeps that heat steady, even in extreme conditions, and a large base offers stability for easy stirring. When its time to break down the campsite and fit all your gear into a crowded pack, youll be relieved to know that the burner and base separate from the propane cylinder for truly compact packing. Rest assured your ultra-portable stove comes with a 3-year limited warranty. The Coleman 5431A700 One-burner Propane Stove is an easy-to-use portable stove that should meet almost any camp cooking need. The PerfectFlow regulator provides consistent cooking performance by producing a steady fuel stream, even in cold weather, high altitudes, or when fuel is low. Equipped with one 10,000 BTU burner, this fully adjustable stove will last for 2.2 hours on high or up to nine hours on low. The pot supports help shield your cooking flame from the wind, while the large eight-inch burner bowl should fit most any pot. This Coleman one-burner stove can boil a quart of water in just four minutes! This stove operates on one 16.4-ounce cylinder of Coleman propane (not included). Manufacturer Warranty
Limited lifetime warranty
data.reviewText:
I was really hoping to give this a good review because I love Coleman, but the stove is small, heavy, not easy to compact carry, and it leaks like crazy.

Even at absolute off the stove will still leak a small but steady flame if there is no wind. I blame it on the design of the knob being so easily exposed and fairly cheaply made. The rest of the stove could hold a damn picnic table, but the control knob is super cheap plastic in the wrong place.

I have only taken this camping once, did not abuse it, and it was brand new. About the 3rd time I used it I noticed the gas leak.

This seems like a great idea as a backup, stay-at-home just in case type stove, but it is not light enough for hiking and it leaks so bad that you wouldn't think to leave on your propane tank ever.

That said, it is a good working stove that can make a single propane tank last quite a while

data.title: Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
data.description: The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It holds 16 cans inside, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! Sporting an adjustable shoulder strap, the cooler is soft on the outside for comfortable carrying, and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect your food from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides antimicrobial protection, to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
data.reviewText: Perfect size for my sons baseball games. Enough for drinks and lunch. Strap is great!

data.title: Coleman Stove Ppn 2 BRN Ml Triton
data.description: Take camp cooking to the next level with the Coleman Triton Propane Stove. Just light it up and dial in your heat with the two independently adjustable burners and you can be cooking over 22,000 BTUs of power in no time. The cooking surface offers plenty of room to fit a 12-in. and 10-in. pan simultaneously. Meanwhile, the PerfectFlow pressure control technology keeps the heat steady, even in extreme conditions. WindBlock panels help shield your flame from wind, and they adjust if you need to fit a larger pan. When the meal is over, the chrome-plated grate removes for simple and quick cleanup, and the heavy-duty latch will keep the lid secure until you whip up your next family dinner.
data.reviewText: Great camp stove. I use it a lot and it works very nicely. I can whip up a very nice meal in the woods and keep finding new recipes to try with it.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Stove Ppn 2 BRN Ml Triton

DESCRIPTION:
Take camp cooking to the next level with the Coleman Triton Propane Stove. Just light it up and dial in your heat with the two independently adjustable burners and you can be cooking over 22,000 BTUs of power in no time. WindBlock panels help shield your flame from wind, and they adjust if you need to fit a larger pan. When the meal is over, the chrome-plated grate removes for simple and quick cleanup, and the heavy-duty latch will keep the lid secure until you whip up your next family dinner.

data.title: Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Grill Case for LX Series Grills
data.description: Add even more portability to your Coleman RoadTrip LX Series Grill when you pack it inside a Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Case. This heavy-duty, weather-resistant case includes easy-glide wheels for more mobility and top and side handles for better control. A durable zipper and inner straps secure the grill the entire trip, and inside pockets fit accessories and condiments for whatever meal youre planning to cook up.
data.reviewText: Purchased this along with the Coleman Grill. Room for the extra pancake griddle, and tools as well. We stow the grill inside this well made case, inside our small RV.  One word of caution though: do not drop it with the grill inside. We did this and broke off a small part of the front that locks the lid.

data.title: Coleman Tent Kit
data.description: Set up the tent quickly with the steel tent pegs and rubber mallet. Keep it clean for the entire campout with the nesting hand broom and dustpan. When the fun is done, use the tent stake puller to get the pegs out of the ground easily. All four of these important tools fit nicely inside the mesh carry bag for the next adventure.
data.reviewText:
This kit seems like a decent idea. While some of it is, the stakes (specifically the tops) just don't hold up.

The spike part of the stakes is fine. However if you're just a hair off the cheap plastic tops will snap off in a heartbeat. Whether staking down or pulling out.

To be honest, the generic, full plastic stakes that came with the tent held up better. They may not last real long, but for how quick these can break you can buy a couple buckets of the general plastic ones.

Naturally if you are camping in more rugged environments, you'll be spending the extra money for the really good stakes. However for the general use car camper, I'd look past this set and load up on the cheaper, heavier plastic ones. The lack of quality in the hook/eye portion of the stakes with this kit just aren't worth the price.
data.text:

Coleman Tent Kit

DESCRIPTION:
Set up the tent quickly with the steel tent pegs and rubber mallet. Keep it clean for the entire campout with the nesting hand broom and dustpan. When the fun is done, use the tent stake puller to get the pegs out of the ground easily. All four of these important tools fit nicely inside the mesh carry bag for the next adventure.

REVIEW:
This kit seems like a decent idea. While some of it is, the stakes (specifically the tops) just don't hold up.

The spike part of the stakes is fine. However if you're just a hair off the cheap plastic tops will snap off in a heartbeat. Whether staking down or pulling out.

To be honest, the generic, full plastic stakes that came with the tent held up better. They may not last real long, but for how quick these can break you can buy a couple buckets of the general plastic ones.

Naturally if you are camping in more rugged environments, you'll be spending the extra money for the really good stakes. However for the general use car camper, I'd look past this set and load up on the cheaper, heavier plastic ones. The lack of quality in the hook/eye portion of the stakes with this kit just aren't worth the price.

data.title: Coleman Road Trip Grill Tools
data.description: The Coleman RoadTrip Grill Tools are the perfect accessory to your Coleman RoadTrip Grill. The tools are made of durable stainless steel with sturdy plastic handles. The set includes a spatula and a set of tongs with handy fork ends. Want longer handles? Just push the red button and the handles extend from 14" to 18.8" long! The Grill Tools come in a convenient carry case with a handle; the case fits into the front pouch of the Coleman RoadTrip Carry Case (sold separately).
data.reviewText: The tongs are horrible and don't grip at all. They fail to line up properly.

data.title: Coleman NEW Outdoor Camping Waterproof 6 Person Instant Tent - 10'x9' Foootprint
data.description: The Coleman 6 Person Camping Instant Tent comes with the WeatherTec system that guarantees to keep you dry. This tent has poles that are pre attached to the tent, and takes only one minute to set up and take down. It features a spacious interior, 150D fabric (twice as thick as regular tent fabric) and there's no need for a separate rainfly because the tent is fully taped. The tent can accommodate two queen sized beds, and with a center height of 6 feet, there's plenty of room to move around and get situated. Great for a weekend trip with the whole family.
data.reviewText: Unfortunately this leaked for us upon first use.

data.title: Coleman Hooligan Backpacking Tent
data.description: The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..
data.reviewText: Tent is bigger then I thought, I am 1.65 meters in height and there is enough space for 3-4 people too(but not for big and tall people, but for people like me)

data.title: Coleman Outdoor Compact Table
data.description: The Coleman Compact Aluminum Table is the perfect camping and outdoor cooking companion. Hot pots and pans will not damage the aluminum slat top. Accordion style steel frame is sturdy and easy to set up.Table height 27.5".Table Weight 9 lbs. 8 oz..Folded Size: 5.5" x 5.5" x 27.5"..Weight capacity 100 lbs..Includes storage bag with carry strap.Directions conveniently sewn on to carry bag..Color: Silver.Import..
data.reviewText: This table is pretty nice.  Very sturdy yet packable and light. Great fit back packing, picnic,  camping,  etc.  A better option than its nylon competitors. It is a roomy table for two people.  Can really be used by four people or six. If everyone is skinny.  But you can literally fit six plates and a bunch of drinks on there.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Outdoor Compact Table

DESCRIPTION:

REVIEW:
This table is pretty nice.  Very sturdy yet packable and light. Great fit back packing, picnic,  camping,  etc.  A better option than its nylon competitors. It is a roomy table for two people.  Can really be used by four people or six. If everyone is skinny.  But you can literally fit six plates and a bunch of drinks on there.

data.title: Coleman 4-Person Instant Tent Rainfly Accessory
data.description: The Coleman 4-Person Instant Tent Rainfly Accessory lets you enjoy added protection from bad weather while increasing airflow inside your tent. Coleman tents are sealed strongly to prevent water from entering, which means campers can sometimes lose airflow when it starts to rain and they zip up the windows. Thats why this rainfly accessory is designed to fit over the top of 8- by 7-foot Coleman 4-Person Instant Tents (sold separately), providing added rain protection while giving you the ability to open windows without having to worry about rainwater getting inside.

data.title: Coleman Camping Coffee Maker
data.description: Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. END
data.reviewText: I have used this for 2 camping seasons (about 5 or 6 times total) and am not really that happy with this coffee maker. It is very slow to brew coffee and after brewing I usually only get 8 cups or so despite filling it up for 12 cups. On my last camping trip I had problems with the top popping off and the bottom actually had a good chunk of metal melt off. The coffee it makes is OK, but I think I will try something else the next trip. I am contacting Coleman for a refund or see if there has been recalls for the issues I have had.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Camping Coffee Maker

DESCRIPTION:
Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. END

REVIEW:
I have used this for 2 camping seasons (about 5 or 6 times total) and am not really that happy with this coffee maker. It is very slow to brew coffee and after brewing I usually only get 8 cups or so despite filling it up for 12 cups. On my last camping trip I had problems with the top popping off and the bottom actually had a good chunk of metal melt off. The coffee it makes is OK, but I think I will try something else the next trip. I am contacting Coleman for a refund or see if there has been recalls for the issues I have had.

data.title: Coleman Beach Shade
data.description: " Take your own shady, private space to the beach or park with the Coleman Beach Shade. This pop-up beach tent is made with UVGuard material that offers 50+ UPF protection from the suns harmful rays and durable Polyguard material that is designed to last season after season. The extended floor can be zipped shut for privacy while changing clothes, and the dry line offers a convenient place to hang wet bathing suits and towels. Integrated storage pockets give you a secure place to put your items while you swim or sunbathe. And when it gets hot, the back window can be unzipped to let the breeze in, while the sand bag compartments can be filled as needed to anchor the beach canopy on windy days. The Coleman Beach Shade comes with ground stakes and pre-attached guy lines and can be set up in about five minutes.
data.reviewText: Nice, easy to put together, fairly large, easily opens and closes and my kids love it. I haven't used it at the beach yet.

data.title: Stearns Child Classic Series Vest
data.description: Whether they're on a boat, a tube, water skis or a personal watercraft, your children will have a blast in Stearns Child Classic Series Vest. They're specially fitted for children 30-50 lbs. The US Coast Guard-approved life jacket is designed with open sides and three adjustable chest belts for a tight fit and better movement. A leg strap keeps the vest from riding up in the water. Durable nylon construction and PE flotation foam, along with 1-in. webbed straps, will allow you to use this vest season after season.

data.title: Coleman Camping Instant Signal Mountain Tent
data.reviewText: Horrible Tent.  I'm just glad I only had to pay $60 for this piece of junk.  This tent lasted 7 days from light use during RAGBRAI 2017.  The overall design of the tent is awful.  The setup is pretty easy, but trying to repack the tent and figure out how to fold it back together is a nightmare.  There are a few pictures to show the setup, but nothing on how to repack the tent.  Not even on youtube.  If you make one wrong fold you'll break a tent pole rolling the tent back up.  The poles on my tent got several stress fractures resulting in one breaking in half (not from setup or repacking). Once the tent is setup it is nice and sturdy and plenty of room for a cot or two.  Just the overall design of the tent leaves a little to be desired.  Just to much going on.  The other bad part of this tent is the damn zippers.  I understand that zippers will get caught in the fabric every now an then, but this thing is constantly getting the zipper caught in the green flap around the door. A serious pain in the a$$. I filed a warranty with Coleman, so we'll see how good their customer service is for this fiasco. Knocking of two stars for the defective tent poles and one star for the zippers

data.title: Coleman Broadband Mesh Quad Camping Chair
data.description: Bring a comfortable seat with you to the campsite with the Coleman Broadband Mesh Quad Camping Chair. Ideal for camping, picnics, or backyard barbeques, this versatile folding chair offers premium comfort in a roomy yet portable design. It features a breathable mesh back that allows the breeze to cool your back on hot days, plus an integrated mesh cup holder that keeps a refreshing beverage within your reach. Designed to ensure your comfort, the chair features an extra-wide 21.3-inch seat that offers plenty of room to lounge and adjustable arms that let you customize the chair to suit your preferences. The strong steel frame can support up to 250 pounds and withstands seasons of heavy use. And thanks to its collapsible design and convenient carrying bag, this folding chair is easy to store and transport.
data.reviewText:
I got this chair to go fishing but after half an hour my legs started hurting like crazy. I am not big nor am I extremely tall. I hope I could help :)

data.title: Coleman Fold N Go Instastart Grill
data.description: This Coleman Fold N Go Portable Grill is ready for your next adventure. Take it along for camping, roadtrips, the beach, tailgating and more.Its unique folding design is sleek and compact, making it easy to transport and store but it's big enough to cook for 5-6 people. The fully-adjustable 6,000-BTU horseshoe-shaped, stainless steel burner provides even heat distribution. Coleman's InstaStart matchless ignition provides push-button lighting, so you can leave the matches at home. The grill's porcelain-coated stamped-steel grate is removable for easy clean-up and can be washed in the dishwasher. A convenient carry handle and secure lid latch make for easy transport. The Fold N Go Grill uses a standard 16.4-ounce propane bottle (sold separately).Instastart for convenient matchless lighting..Convenient carry handle..Removable water pan, grease tray for simple clean up (pan is dishwasher safe.).Folding metal feet and handle tuck out of the way when not in use..PerfectFlow pressure control system regulates fuel for constant, even heat..Perfect heat design for optimal cooking performance..Acessory grate, griddle and carry case sold separately..Operates up to 3.5 hours on one 16.4 oz Coleman propane cylindar (propane not included).Size: 16.6" x 14.5" x 6.8"..

data.title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
data.description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
data.reviewText: For about $100 dollars great value. We are a family of four with two small children. We bought this tent to have enough space in the event of a rain day. I was disappointed after the first rain, of pooling along the inside edges of the tent. I was disappointed that directions need to be better. The tent does indeed pack back with all accessories into the carry bag included. I do not camp often, so I wanted a tent that I did not have to waterproof. Because of the claim by Coleman with their Weathertec water proofing, I was more confident in my purchase. I did see the rain bead and run off the tent fabric. But after awhile, the fabric below the rain fly and above the floor tub became saturated and wet to the touch inside. Also, on the very cool nights, this same section became wet to the touch inside the tent. The fabric under the rain fly never was wet and never had condensation in the morning. The ventilation is okay if there is a good breeze, otherwise the sun really heats up the  tent. Since the rain fly is velcroed to tents poles, guywired to ground stakes and attached to tent pole rings with bungee cord, removing the rain fly was not practical. It is really better to be outside the tent to remain cool than to rely on the mesh to keep the tent cool. This was our experience. We had battery operated fans which helped. I returned the tent after one week of use and two rainy nights primarily due to the water issues.

data.title: Coleman Coastal Xtreme Series Marine Portable Cooler, 120 Quart
data.description: Keep your food and drinks cold for the full length of your next boating excursion with the Coleman 120-Quart Coastal Xtreme 6-Day Marine Cooler. Specially designed for boating and fishing, this portable cooler combines a generous capacity with a rugged design that stands up to tough saltwater conditions. Large enough to store up to 204 cans, the cooler offers plenty of room for beverages, food, and any catch you might haul on board. The insulated lid and walls offer up to 6 days of ice retention, helping ensure your catch stays fresh even during multiday voyages. Built to withstand years of rugged marine use, this heavy-duty cooler comes equipped with rust-resistant stainless steel hardware and UV Guard sun protection that resists yellowing and cracking. A threaded drain with an easy-to-clean valve allows you to empty excess water without tilting the cooler. The smooth EZ-Clean lid easily wipes clean of grime and dirt, while the Have-A-Seat lid offers a comfortable place to sit and relax. And thanks to its comfortable no-crush handle grips, this fishing cooler is easy to transport, whether you're bringing whole meals on a boating trip or heading to your favorite fishing spot.
data.reviewText: Huge and sturdy.

data.title: Coleman Camp Axe
data.description: Get the right tool for multiple jobs when you're at the campsite with the Coleman Camp Axe. The sharp edge of the durable drop-forged steel head easily splits wood for a campfire or stove, while the flat edge works wonders for driving tent stakes into hard ground. When it's time to pack up, pulling your tent stakes is easy with the notch cut into the head. Durable and well built, the Coleman Camp Axe is perfect for the campsite, wooded terrain, or the backyard. The axe is equipped with a drop-forged carbon-steel axe head that easily splits wood into kindling, along with a forged steel handle and an ergonomic nonslip grip. With the Coleman Camp Axe, you'll be ready for any camping contingency.
data.reviewText:
The axe is an adequate tool, made of decent metal.  The edge is as sharp as a marble, but hey, you get what you pay for, and this is an axe-shaped block of metal with a handle attached.
I suggest getting an axe file, a wire brush, and a sharpening stone.  For $6, you can destroy this thing and benefit from the knowledge and practice you gained.  And then continue to use it as a wedge.

data.title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
data.description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
data.reviewText:
First...why do I not like it? It's heavy...I don't mean a little heavy...it's REALLY HEAVY.

When I needed a grill to take camping with my new travel trailer I read the reviews and purchased this. I WAS using a cheap gas grill from Lowes that I mounted to it's stand with thumbscrews. It worked but you had the grill body, it's stand, and a gas bottle. All took up room. So I figured a portable tailgate type grill would be great. Low and behold...Amazon had this one in the Warehouse deals...so I got it.

This thing is a beast...has to be 60+ pounds with bag and 2 bottles....W.T.H. ?? My el-cheapo grill with it's stand is like 1/3rd of that. So, it's heavier than my 'red-necked' grill. Big too...in it's bag it will NOT fit in my front storage area under my travel trailer. I have to put it inside the trailer or the back of my truck to take it with me.

It DOES cook well. I've used it for burgers and weenies and seem to cook evenly. It has a LOT of room and the controls are well labeled. I just wish it was half the weight.

data.title: Coleman Instant Cabin 10 Tent with Fly
data.description: The Coleman Instant Tent 10 will sleep 10 people. It sets up in about 1 minute and take down is about the same. Made with rugged fabrics and an ingeniously easy set up system the Instant Cabin 10 will delight you with it's ease of construction. 7 windows give excellent ventilation and the rugged Polyethylene floor is tough and durable. Rugged Powder Coated Steel poles and easy folding frame are the heart of this radical tent design that will forever change your view of how fast a tent should take to set up. The roof is comprised of mesh panels for excellent ventilation (covered by the rain fly). Includes Factory Sealed rainfly that attaches in seconds.Freestanding Design is simple and fast to set up.Includes a Heavy Duty 150D Polyester Factory Sealed Rainfly.Zipper flap on the door keeps moisture out.Interior will fit 4 queen size air mattresses.7 windows for excellent ventilation - all windows have Storm Flaps & huge mesh roof panels for improved ventilation.Inner Mesh Storage Pockets.Take Down is fast and easy - about 1 minute.Set up the tent in Rain and the interior stays dry.Straighter walls than most tents for more usable space in the tent.No frame assembly or pre-assembly needed - poles are attached to the tent - just unfold the tent to set it up.External Guy Out Loops - keep the tent stable in wind.Lantern loop on the ceiling.Instructions are sewn to the bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.Sturdy Powder Coated Steel Frame.All carry bags, stakes included.Import.
data.reviewText:
We recently purchased this tent from Costco for $185. We had an old Coleman tent (about 30 years old) that needed replacing and I had been eyeing the instant tents for years.

Pros:
Very easy set up - especially compared to the complicated set up of our similarly sized tent we had before. That being said - cut the instructions out of the bag and throw them away... Watch a You Tube video or two and you'll see how easy set up and take down really is. I also really like the entrances at both ends of the tent, especially because my husband and I take the "back" and put the kids up front. There is a lot of ventilation, which I love. The hindged door is nice, although getting it to Velcro shut can be a pain.

Cons:
The room divider is very flimsy and seems like an afterthought. Our old Coleman had a much better room divider. This was disappointing for me as one of my main reasons for getting a tent this size was the two rooms.

data.title: Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue
data.description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
data.reviewText: We bought two of these water containers for camping.  If you need something to hold 5 gallons of water, this will do the job.  If the use of a spigot is important, I would not recommend this product.  The first problem is leaking.  The spigot valve itself actually shuts off fine. The problem is you cannot properly seal the connection between the cap and the canister.  The seam on at the mouth of the cannister leaves a ridge that the rubber seal cannot overcome no matter how tight the cap is twisted on the threads. The second problem is the handle on one of the spigots broke off on our first camping trip.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue

DESCRIPTION:
Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.

REVIEW:
We bought two of these water containers for camping.  If you need something to hold 5 gallons of water, this will do the job.  If the use of a spigot is important, I would not recommend this product.  The first problem is leaking.  The spigot valve itself actually shuts off fine. The problem is you cannot properly seal the connection between the cap and the canister.  The seam on at the mouth of the cannister leaves a ridge that the rubber seal cannot overcome no matter how tight the cap is twisted on the threads. The second problem is the handle on one of the spigots broke off on our first camping trip.

data.title: Coleman Steel-Belted Portable Cooler, 54 Quart
data.description: Go back in time with cold food and drinks today when you take a Coleman 54 Quart Steel Belted Cooler along with you. It looks just like the one you remember with its classic design first developed in 1954. Large enough to hold 85 cans and tall enough to hold 2-liter bottles upright, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip steel handles and stainless steel lid latch make getting to your destination easy, comfortable and secure. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax while you enjoy the day with a cold drink in hand. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. A Coleman Steel Belted Cooler will rekindle your fondest outdoor memories  and equip you to make many new ones.
data.reviewText: The quality isn't great. I had to return the first one and the second one they sent me has bubbles in the finish. Too much trouble to return it again.

data.title: Coleman One-Mantle Kerosene Lantern
data.description:
Illuminate your outdoor adventures with the Coleman One-Mantle Kerosene Lantern. This durable camping lantern features a one-mantle design that casts up to 784 lumens of high-intensity light. You can light the lantern with a quick match strike and dial in the desired brightness level with the adjustable dimmer knob. The high-temperature globe resists cracking and is protected by built-in spring clips, and the porcelain-coated ventilator helps resist corrosion and rust. A bail handle makes it easy to carry or hang the lantern, and the fuel tank provides a steady base when the lantern is placed on a table or other surface. This outdoor lantern lasts up to 5.75 hours on high with 2 pints of kerosene (sold separately). It comes with a pre-installed #11 mantle and a plastic bottle to help fill the pre-heater. Sometimes, you just can't beat a classic kerosene lantern to light up your campsite. This model is iconic lantern maker Coleman's brightest such device, offering high-intensity light output with the included #11 mantles. It provides up to 5.5 hours of burn time on one two-pint kerosene tank, and -- thanks to an easy-to-operate, single-knob control -- it's as intuitive to use as it is durable. The fuel tank is coated on the interior to hold up to repeated use, and a "porcelain-ized" ventilator resists rust. Includes an automatic tip cleaner. The Coleman Limited Warranty
All Coleman products have a warranty against defects in material and workmanship, and details are included with your purchase. About Coleman Outdoor Products
More than 100 years ago, an entrepreneurial young man named W.C. Coleman had an idea for manufacturing better lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. A century later, Coleman's current catalog features a wide-ranging array of products that make spending time outside a pleasure. The company crafts coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days, airbeds that are comfortable and won't deflate during the night, a complete line of bright and long-lasting LED lights, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and more.
data.reviewText: I like the kerosene lantern because it gives me an alternative, less costly fuel to burn vs coleman fuel.  The down side of kerosene is it takes longer to light.  First, there is a 'pre-heat' cup that you put a small amount of denatured alcohol into it.  Fill your main tank with kerosene and pump it up.  Assuming you have installed a mantel and properly burned it first, fill the pre-heat cup with denatured alcohol, light it.  As it burns, it will heat the lanterns generator to further vaporize the kerosene.  After aprox 2 minutes, turn on main fuel valve and kerosene will light and your lamp is 500 candle power of bright light. IF there is a down side to this lantern, it is the pre-heat time and the main fuel valve is ON or OFF.  There is no 'dim' function.  Full light or no light. IF you want instant light, buy a battery operated light. Another note, in summer, in a well ventilated room, there is additional heat from the lantern.  In winter, this is a nice benefit.  In summer heat, not so much of a benefit. I believe this fuel tank will hold aprox 32 oz of kerosene.  FYI, I put exactly 16 oz of kerosene in this, lit it and timed it to run 5 hours on 16 oz. At aprox half of the tank full, it allows room for the air pump to pressurize the tank to operate the lantern. Plus, 5 hrs is plenty of run time for me in 1 filling.

This outdoor lantern lasts up to 5.75 hours on high with 2 pints of kerosene (sold separately). It comes with a pre-installed #11 mantle and a plastic bottle to help fill the pre-heater. Sometimes, you just can't beat a classic kerosene lantern to light up your campsite. A century later, Coleman's current catalog features a wide-ranging array of products that make spending time outside a pleasure. REVIEW: I like the kerosene lantern because it gives me an alternative, less costly fuel to burn vs coleman fuel. The down side of kerosene is it takes longer to light. First, there is a 'pre-heat' cup that you put a small amount of denatured alcohol into it. Fill your main tank with kerosene and pump it up. Assuming you have installed a mantel and properly burned it first, fill the pre-heat cup with denatured alcohol, light it. IF you want instant light, buy a battery operated light. Another note, in summer, in a well ventilated room, there is additional heat from the lantern. In winter, this is a nice benefit. In summer heat, not so much of a benefit. I believe this fuel tank will hold aprox 32 oz of kerosene. FYI, I put exactly 16 oz of kerosene in this, lit it and timed it to run 5 hours on 16 oz. At aprox half of the tank full, it allows room for the air pump to pressurize the tank to operate the lantern. Plus, 5 hrs is plenty of run time for me in 1 filling.

data.description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
data.reviewText: This goes in my van everytime I go camping. My dog's drinking water, and dish washing water comes from here.

data.title: Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium
data.description: Take your Coleman stove wherever outdoor adventures lead you with the Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium. Designed to fit Coleman 2-burner stoves measuring up to 21.5 x 14 x 4.8 inches, this rugged carry case made from PVC-coated polyester protects your stove during transportation and storage. Strong web handles provide comfort when toting stoves between campsites, while the durable zipper is designed to keep stoves safe and dry. Two propane pouches with drawstrings securely carry extra fuel canisters (sold separately).
data.reviewText: Lasted one camping trip. As equipment was being put away for off season, I noticed the seam had completely ripped out. Worked for only one trip. Wouldn't buy again.

data.title: Coleman Steel-Belted Portable Cooler, 54 Quart
data.description: Go back in time with cold food and drinks today when you take a Coleman 54 Quart Steel Belted Cooler along with you. It looks just like the one you remember with its classic design first developed in 1954. Large enough to hold 85 cans and tall enough to hold 2-liter bottles upright, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip steel handles and stainless steel lid latch make getting to your destination easy, comfortable and secure. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax while you enjoy the day with a cold drink in hand. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. A Coleman Steel Belted Cooler will rekindle your fondest outdoor memories  and equip you to make many new ones.
data.reviewText:
Cons :

The drain is a simple cap held on by friction.  A cooler this size really needs a screw on cap.
Child-proofing the lid has made the closing latch almost useless.

The closing latch completely failed in one summer season. The cooler never left the safety of my truck bed and belted in place.

I absolutely will not purchase this item again.

data.title: Coleman Camp Axe
data.description: Get the right tool for multiple jobs when you're at the campsite with the Coleman Camp Axe. The sharp edge of the durable drop-forged steel head easily splits wood for a campfire or stove, while the flat edge works wonders for driving tent stakes into hard ground. When it's time to pack up, pulling your tent stakes is easy with the notch cut into the head. Durable and well built, the Coleman Camp Axe is perfect for the campsite, wooded terrain, or the backyard. The axe is equipped with a drop-forged carbon-steel axe head that easily splits wood into kindling, along with a forged steel handle and an ergonomic nonslip grip. With the Coleman Camp Axe, you'll be ready for any camping contingency.
data.reviewText:
I bought this to replace a small axe that I lost on my last camping trip.
I've been camping a long time and Coleman's products have always been at or near top of my list for gear. This "axe" though is not worth the paper the receipt is printed on. I bought mine at Target for $10 a few months ago. We had a maple tree fall in a hurricaine Sandy a few weeks so I had a tree service cut the tree up into logs for me to split into fire wood so I decided to try this axe out on some of the smaller logs, less than 4-5 inches diameter. I sharpened it first since it came about as dull as a butter knife (which would probably split better that this)
The curve of the handle makes it tough for me to hit the logs properly and the rubber handle cover moves around while I am using it. I suppose a paracord wrap might help with that but it's just not worth the effort.
IMHO it's good for two things, cutting very small branches that you could break by hand or if your trees are made of paper machet.
Maybe I'm just used to straight, wood handle axes but this was not worth it for me.
I suppose you could impress your non-outdoorsy friends by having a camp axe but I certainly woldn't take it camping. Save your money and buy a Fiskars or Estwing or even better, a Gransfors. They may cost more but are worth the extra.

IMHO it's good for two things, cutting very small branches that you could break by hand or if your trees are made of paper machet.
Maybe I'm just used to straight, wood handle axes but this was not worth it for me.

data.title: Coleman 8D Family Size LED Lantern
data.description:
The Coleman 8D Family-Size LED Lantern is a strong, reliable light source for camping, fishing, travel, and as a standby for power outages and other emergencies. The bright, long-lasting Cree XR-E LED provides 170 lumens on the "high" setting. The innovative conical reflector diffuses and disseminates light for a wide, spotlight-like area of illumination. The lantern runs for a full 66 hours on low and 32 hours on high, with a set of 8 D-cell batteries (not included). It even sports a "nightlight" setting. The LED Lantern is weather-resistant, with durable ABS housing, a snug fit clear globe, chrome-plated globe guards, and an overlapping ventilator top for duty in the great outdoors. A bail handle makes the lantern easy to hang up, carry, pack and store. The Coleman 8D Family-Size LED Lantern provides a strong and reliable light source for camping, fishing, travel, and as a standby for power outages and other emergencies. The bright, long-lasting Cree XR-E LED provides 170 lumens on the "high" setting and will not heat up under extended use, making it a safe option for families. The light is equipped with an innovative conical reflector that diffuses and disseminates light for a wide, spotlight-like area of illumination. With three settings, low, high, and nightlight, the lantern offers impressive runtimes of 66 hours on low and 32 hours on high, with a set of 8 D-cell batteries (not included). Designed for all-purpose and outdoors use, the lantern boasts a durable weather-resistant ABS housing, a snug fit clear globe, chrome-plated rhino guards, and an overlapping ventilator top. A bail handle makes the lantern easy to hang up, carry, pack, and store. Features and Specifications:
  • Light settings: high; low; nightlight
  • Maximum output: 175 lumens (high)
  • Run times: 66 hours on low; 32 hours on high
  • Four-position switch: Off/High/Low/Nightlight
  • Durable chrome-plated rhino guard
  • Weather resistant ABS housing
  • Snug fit clear globe
  • Bail handle
  • Cool touch LED
  • Weight: 3.26 pounds without batteries
  • Dimensions: 11.81 by 6.53 to 7.28 inches (HxW)
  • Operates: 8D batteries (sold separately)
  • Made in China
data.reviewText: Having said that I like it. I well take to heart the first reviewer that mentioned using tissue paper as a filter diffuser. I am going to iron some tissue paper smooth and then laminate it between a 15 inch long menu pouch. And tape up the ends to make a cylinder I can just pop over this...no wait..better still use a strip of velcro to hold the laminate together so it can travel flattened out. I bet it works. I attempted to hunt down the product a comment left under that review but turns out it's something they use in theater lights to diffuse the large light systems but couldn't find any small quantities for every day home owners. I wrote to the company via their site but they have yet to answer asking if they could recommend a seller. So not sure why the comment was even left if one can't buy a little bit readily. Anyway puts out significant light. I'm happy with that. I'd like maybe another lower level than it seems to go. But it turns off easy. The battery box is easy to open and remove and replace batteries. I'm going to pick up some spacers that use aa batteries to keep on hand as back ups. I have AA recharable batteries already but it would cost around 80 dollars for rechare D's for 8 and also a new charger that fit the D size. So Ma Nature is going to strike me with a bolt of lightning if I don't do something to offset the D dead battery problem. OH yeah I feel her anger! I'm fumbling through  my remote candles that use recharged AA's right now as I write this :[[  Happy camping. Oh did I mention how super easy it is to remove the bottom to get to the batteries?

data.title: Coleman 48 Can Party Stacker Cooler
data.description: With the Coleman Party Stacker-Inchs unique stackable, color-coded design, you-Inchll want more than one for parties, tailgating, BBQs and more. The Party Stacker features a clever interlocking base and lid, so you can stack multiple coolers with no slipping or sliding -- great for easy transporting and tidy storage. The Party Stackers come in four great colors, so you can separate drinks or dishes by cooler color. The 33-Quart Party Stacker accommodates two cases of twelve-ounce cans or one case of bottles or longnecks plus ice -- and it-Inchs wide enough for a 9-Inchx13-Inch casserole dish. The Party Stacker features tough molded handles for comfortable lifting and carrying, with a sleek, low-profile design for stability. Exterior measures 22-InchL x 13.5-InchW x 11.75-InchH. Made in the USA.
data.reviewText: The lid isn't great and doesn't seem to stay cool that long.
