REVIEW:
A very handy grill.
We use it every trip in our motor home.
Seems to get dirtier than most other grills but it's not hard to clean.
Knocked off 1 star because the propane bottles do not line up correctly with the bracket that holds them.
I'm not going to use the expensive small bottles after I run out so it won't matter.
I bought a hose so I can use a regular propane tank.

data.title: Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue
data.description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
data.reviewText: works for a while but spout breaks easily and cannot find replacement

data.title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
data.description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
data.reviewText:
The first time I pitched it camping, a small stick poked through the bottom.  Coleman doesn't cover this kind of damage (I checked), but I guess it's my fault for not checking the ground (how can you with this massive footprint?), and also not putting a tarp down first.  But, I was still surprised at how easily that little stick poked through.

Also, the zipper for the door isn't the greatest design, but it works. Definitely keep the zipper closed before you pitch it, and during.

It kept us dry even with heavy downpour the first night and is very spacious.  Keep in mind the "rooms" aren't rooms, but just have a removable nylon divider sheet.

Overall, a good purchase. Wait for a Lightning Deal, I've seen this tent go up multiple times, I got mine for $70.
data.text:

DESCRIPTION:
Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.

REVIEW:
The first time I pitched it camping, a small stick poked through the bottom.  Coleman doesn't cover this kind of damage (I checked), but I guess it's my fault for not checking the ground (how can you with this massive footprint?), and also not putting a tarp down first.  But, I was still surprised at how easily that little stick poked through.

Also, the zipper for the door isn't the greatest design, but it works. Definitely keep the zipper closed before you pitch it, and during.

It kept us dry even with heavy downpour the first night and is very spacious.  Keep in mind the "rooms" aren't rooms, but just have a removable nylon divider sheet.

Overall, a good purchase. Wait for a Lightning Deal, I've seen this tent go up multiple times, I got mine for $70.

data.title: Coleman 16-Quart Personal Wheeled Cooler, Blue
data.description:
Keep your food and drinks cold, and keep the fun going, for up to 2 days when you roll in with a Coleman 16 Quart Performance Wheeled Cooler. Large enough to hold 22 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for several people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or across the ball field, the recessed wheels and long, telescoping handle let you roll up with hardly any effort. The additional molded handles make it easy to lift your cooler in and out of the car or onto a picnic bench. Coleman provides a convenient way to keep things cold, even when you're on-the-go, with the 16-Quart Personal Wheeled Cooler. This convenient cooler can hold up to 22 12-ounce cans or two 2-liter bottles upright and features traditional Coleman construction for rugged durability. Other features include an extendable handle that retracts for convenient storage and recessed wheels for easy transport to and from your favorite sporting events and outdoor activities. This durable Coleman cooler comes with a limited manufacturer's warranty. About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
data.reviewText: The handle would not go all the way up and when you put it down it would go through the bottom and stick out... Very upset about this product...

data.title: Coleman LED Camp Lantern
data.description: Light up the night with a Coleman 4AA LED Camp Lantern. Five bright white LEDs produce 54 lumens of effective, efficient light output that you can take with you wherever you go outside and indoors. The lantern boasts a long runtime of on four AA-cell batteries, so the sun will come up long before you need fresh power. The lightweight, durable, weather-resistant construction will withstand the elements, for illumination that keeps up with you, whatever the adventure.
data.reviewText: So small. I must have overlooked that fact when researching for a decent camp table sized lantern. What an embarrassment. Can be used inside a small tent at best.

data.title: Coleman Triton Series InstaStart 2-Burner Stove
data.description: Cook breakfast, lunch and dinner on the legendary durability of a Coleman Triton Series InstaStart 2-Burner Stove. The InstaStart push-button matchless lighting system makes ignition easy. Once this propane camping stove starts to heat up, PerfectHeat Technology gets the temperatures just right, WindBlock Shields keep the wind from blowing the flames around and the PerfectFlow Pressure Control System keeps the heat steady on each of the high-performance 11,000-BTU burners. The spacious cooking surface is large enough to fit a 10-in. (25.4 cm) pan and 12-in. (30.48 cm) pan at the same time, and independently-adjustable controls allow you to set your heat anywhere from simmer to boil. The two burner camp stove is also efficient, with a 1-hr. runtime on high using a single 16.4-oz. propane cylinder. When the fun is done, removable heavy-duty, nickel-chrome grates make cleaning easy, and the built-in handle will have you carrying this lightweight stove effortlessly.
data.reviewText: Works great and worked every time. I had no problem with the igniter and had no issues with the control knob sensitivity. The cover design blocked the wind and the stove top was easy to clean.

REVIEW:
Works great and worked every time. I had no problem with the igniter and had no issues with the control knob sensitivity. The cover design blocked the wind and the stove top was easy to clean.

data.title: Coleman Rechargeable QuickPump Unit
data.description:
Bring your Coleman Rechargeable QuickPump Unit on your trip and inflate your air mattress at lightning speedwell, almost. More like two minutes. This handy pump inflates products that feature Coleman's Double Lock Valves, Boston valves, and, with adapters (included), pinch valves. Use the re-charger to re-juice the QuickPump whenever you're near an outlet.

  • Recommended Use: Car camping, travel, inflating air mattresses

data.reviewText: I've only used this twice and now it won't recharge. This is quite disappointing! It looks like others have had the same issue.

REVIEW: I've only used this twice and now it won't recharge. This is quite disappointing! It looks like others have had the same issue.

data.title: Coleman Tent Kit
data.description: Set up the tent quickly with the steel tent pegs and rubber mallet. Keep it clean for the entire campout with the nesting hand broom and dustpan. When the fun is done, use the tent stake puller to get the pegs out of the ground easily. All four of these important tools fit nicely inside the mesh carry bag for the next adventure.
data.reviewText:
The mallet is ok, but the stakes are not very good, and the puller is useless.  I used this once, as I couldn't find my stakes, and I needed something in a hurry.  The stakes were fine going into the ground.  The plastic part around the top of the stakes start to come off when you begin to pull them up.  The puller is practically useless.  If you look at it, any kind of torque on the puller causes it to bend open.

The dustpan and broom is a little small for most tasks, but is ok to brush up a little bit of the dirt from your tent. The mallet was used throughout the rest of the summer as well, and handled fine but I don't think this whole kit is worth it.

If you are in a pinch, I suppose it would do.

data.title: Coleman Cooler Standard Drain Plug Assembly - 1" Shaft Length
data.reviewText:
I needed these replacement drain parts for work coolers.  We have a wide variety of sizes and types but most are Coleman brand coolers.  We tend to ship a lot of coolers and when we get them back they tend to be broken either by the delivery company or the lab that we shipped to.  We would always just start stripping the smaller coolers for parts to use on the larger coolers because they are needed more often and are more expensive to replace but after a while we had cooler lids and bases and did not want to spend the money on replacement coolers.

Finding these drain replacement parts was the last step in putting some of our coolers back together.  You can also purchase the handles and hinges on Amazon.  These parts are the exact same pieces that come with the whole coolers and fit perfectly.  Being an add-on item they only cost 4.99 a piece when purchased with another item but if you need a few drain replacement parts add enough to be over 25 dollars which is 6 of them.  These coolers will last and last with these replacement parts.  If we need more I will definitely buy here again.

data.title: Coleman Butane / Propane Mix Fuel (Mix Fuel 7.75 oz.) - 7.75 oz.
data.description: Butane/propane mix canisters are lightweight, resalable, and easily connect to stoves and lanterns. Most canister appliances are lightweight and simple to use, so if you are a backpacker who counts ounces and appreciates convenience this fuel is for you. Downsides are that canisters can't be recycled, and in subfreezing temperatures, the fuel does not perform well. Or at all. Cold temperatures affect the pressure in the canister, so performance is best in mild to moderate conditions, main advantages: convenience and light weight includes a collar notch on top of the canister that provides easy alignment in appliances

data.title: Coleman Dome Tent for Camping | Sundome Tent with Easy Setup
data.description: Sundome 2P Dome TentFeatures:Up to 33% more water resistant verses a comparable standard Coleman tent Weathertec System patented welded floors and inverted seams help keep water outSnag-Free continuous pole sleeves for easy setup Ground Vent for increased ventilationTwo windows for great ventilation and viewsDoor awning helps keep the rain out E-Port makes it easy to bring electrical power inside your tent Storage pocket to keep your gear organized Expandable carry bag lets you tear away the rip strip for easy packingSpecifications:Doors:1 D-DoorRainfly:PolyguardTent:Polyguard,Polyester Mesh 68DPoles:FiberglassWeight: 7.2 (3.3 KG)<br/
data.reviewText: This tent was a beast. It's too small for two people to be honest. Tall people might find it a wee bit claustrophobic so you might want to splurge on the 3 person version. But it fit my cot, my gear, and me -  and withstood 50 mph winds at the campsite. I did have to take the rainfly off however because it made the tent more airborne. It rattled like a ship's sail all night, but stood up to whatever the Mojave blew at it. I may get a second one to store in case I destroy this one. Get better tent pegs and a mallet though. The ones supplied were crap and bent and I had to bring a hammer from my kit at home. There were two tents better than mine and they were much more expensive. Suck it Mojave Desert!

data.title: Coleman Premium Dual Fuel Lantern with Hard Carry Case
data.description: Carry a bright light with fuel versatility when you pack a Coleman Premium Dual Fuel Lantern with hard carry case. This outdoor companion runs on either Coleman Liquid Fuel or unleaded gasoline. The Dual Fuel design is less expensive to run, because it uses less fuel than propane-powered lanterns. It's also more reliable, with better dependability in the coldest conditions. One tank of fuel will power the lantern for up to seven hours on high. Find just the right light with an adjustable knob that allows you to dim the brightness level from its highest at 700 lumens to as low as you need it. This two-mantle lantern is perfect for camping, hunting, tailgating and in cases of emergency. It includes a 3-year limited warranty.
data.reviewText: Did not hold pressure. Sold the lantern and kept the case. I bought a older green one at a yard sale it works good and holds pressure. Fits in the case.

data.title: Coleman QuickPack Deluxe Propane Lantern
data.description: Make packing up your lantern as easy as possible with the Coleman QuickPack Deluxe Propane Lantern. The 2-mantle design of this lantern creates a steady, bright glow of up to 1000 lumens of light that reaches up to 22 meters away. A quick match strike is all you need to get your lantern started, then simply dial in the perfect brightness with the adjustable control knob. Once your lantern is lit, the wide base provides stability when placed on a table, and the bail handle allows for easy hanging. No matter where you go, the PerfectFlow pressure-control technology produces a steady fuel stream and consistent performance in all kinds of weather. When you're ready to head home, the QuickPack storage system helps get you on your way quickly, since the lantern base is also the bottom of your case. Just place the outer cover and you're all packed up until you're ready for your next bright adventure.
data.reviewText: Pain to initially unpack and the enclosure doesn't really stay closed well. The handle pops off a lil too easily. But it is real easy to use and very very bright.

Not limited to canned drinks, the wide base fits 13 x 9 in. serving dishes, so you can easily pack something for everyone. When the fun is done, the specially designed base fits in the lid of other Party Stacker items, making them simple to stack and store until the next glorious get together.

data.title: Coleman Tent for Camping | Elite Montana Tent with Easy Setup
data.description: Stretch out and relax in style with the Coleman Elite Montana 8-Person Lighted Tent. This cutting-edge camping tent features a cabin-like design with a variety of outdoor technologies to enhance any camping trip. The large outdoor tent can fit three queen size air beds, ensuring your whole family has plenty of room. When the sun goes down, you keep the party going with the six built-in CPX LED lights that provide 100 lumens of illumination. The lighting system can be powered by four D batteries (sold separately) or the included CPX 6 rechargeable power cartridge and comes with an energy pack that can power virtually anything with a USB slot. During the day, the auto-roll windows neatly roll down when you unzip them and can open at an angle to let in light but not water when it rains. This 8-person tent is designed with the WeatherTec system that features patented welded floors and inverted seams to help ensure you stay dry. An extended door awning creates a dry space for you to store gear and enter the tent, while the patented hinged door makes it easy to come and go. The heavy-duty tent sets up easily in about 15 minutes thanks to snag-free continuous pole sleeves, a patented pin-and-ring system, and snag-free Insta-Clip suspension. Clip on the included rainfly for added wetness protection, or gaze at the stars through the mesh ceiling.

data.title: Coleman 0°F Mummy Sleeping Bag for Big and Tall Adults | North Rim Cold-Weather Sleeping Bag
data.reviewText:
I do three season hiking in the Appalachian Trail region. In early spring and late fall the temperatures can get pretty low. I had decided that I wanted a mummy bag previously and began searching for something around the 20+ degree range. I stumbled upon this bag and given its price thought that it would make a good purchase. I believe I made the right choice.

Pros - This bag is warm. While the description states that it is a "0-Degree" bag, I would not suggest using it in that type of weather. A lot of individuals see that and believe that they could sleep in 0-degree weather comfortably. That is not the case. My guess is that this bag would be comfortable around 30-degrees. I have not yet had it out in weather that cold so I cannot say for sure. Furthermore, in weather that cold I typically place a couple of body or hand warmers in the bag with me. You could also use a sleeping bag liner which would make this bag warmer as well. For most individuals camping in typical camping weather, this bag will be more than enough.

In order to reach that 0-degree rating, the bag has a considerable amount of insulation inside of it. This makes it fairly comfortable to sleep in. I use a self-inflating sleeping pad when I hike. The combination of the bag and the pad made for a relatively comfortable nights sleep.

Cons - As stated above, the warmth and comfort is achieved through a generous amount of insulation. This also results in the bag being fairly heavy and bulky. You will have a difficult time attempting to stuff this into a backpack (I use a Teton 5200 and I cannot fit it into the sleeping bag compartment. Instead I put it in the main compartment and put my clothes in the sleeping bag compartment). If you have the money and will be doing a lot of backpacking I would suggest getting a smaller, more manageable, bag.

data.title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
data.description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
data.reviewText: We were a little hesitant about this buy, but can't be happier. It's a great size for two adults and two kids, everyone can stand up in it, move around without bumping into anyone else, etc. The privacy flaps are tie-down, but if the kids want their own "room" or "rooms" we can make that happen, which is nice. This is definitely a summer to mid-fall tent; the last time we used it was early to mid-September (maybe around the high 40s or low 50s at night?), and that was as cold as I'd be willing to use it. But in terms of summer, the air flow of this tent is GREAT, and better than any other tent I've used. Setup is a little tricky the first time, but after that is easy to remember. Repacking the tent into its original bag is a challenge, though, which may have to be remedied with a larger stuff sack.

data.title: Coleman 2 Gallon Party Stacker Beverage Cooler
data.description: Keep quenched in fun, space-saving style with a Coleman 2 Gallon Party Stacker Jug. The unique stacking design offers vertical storage and use, while its two-gallon capacity is perfect for school parties and family functions. You can even use different colored jugs for different drinks so serving and filling is fast and fun. The removable spigot is easy to clean, and the large bail handle makes carrying easy.
data.reviewText: The cooler is decent quality, and didn't leak when turned over on the side.  The issue I have is the stream that comes out of the spigot.  It barely dribbles,  I bought this to use at my vendor booth for hand washing, and I stood there for a LONG time to get enough water to come out to wash my hands.  Other coolers have a steady full stream, this dribbles out slowly at best. It doesn't seem broken, just poorly designed. I will return it and look for a different brand with a different spigot mechanism, this is not worth standing around waiting for dribbles of water.  $20 isa lot of money for a 2 gallon cooler.. I just bought a cooler with wheels and a pull handle from Wal-Mart that holds 60 cans for the same $20 price.  This cooler here is worth $5-$7 on a good day.

data.title: Coleman 8D Family Size LED Lantern
data.description:
The Coleman 8D Family-Size LED Lantern is a strong, reliable light source for camping, fishing, travel, and as a standby for power outages and other emergencies. The bright, long-lasting Cree XR-E LED provides 170 lumens on the "high" setting. The innovative conical reflector diffuses and disseminates light for a wide, spotlight-like area of illumination. The lantern runs for a full 66 hours on low and 32 hours on high, with a set of 8 D-cell batteries (not included). It even sports a "nightlight" setting. The LED Lantern is weather-resistant, with durable ABS housing, a snug fit clear globe, chrome-plated globe guards, and an overlapping ventilator top for duty in the great outdoors. A bail handle makes the lantern easy to hang up, carry, pack and store. The Coleman 8D Family-Size LED Lantern provides a strong and reliable light source for camping, fishing, travel, and as a standby for power outages and other emergencies. The bright, long-lasting Cree XR-E LED provides 170 lumens on the "high" setting and will not heat up under extended use, making it a safe option for families. The light is equipped with an innovative conical reflector that diffuses and disseminates light for a wide, spotlight-like area of illumination. With three settings, low, high, and nightlight, the lantern offers impressive runtimes of 66 hours on low and 32 hours on high, with a set of 8 D-cell batteries (not included). Designed for all-purpose and outdoors use, the lantern boasts a durable weather-resistant ABS housing, a snug fit clear globe, chrome-plated rhino guards, and an overlapping ventilator top. A bail handle makes the lantern easy to hang up, carry, pack, and store. Features and Specifications:

data.title: Coleman Soft Plush Top Inflated Quickbed
data.description: Take the comfort of an indoor bed with you when you sleep outside on the Coleman Queen Airbed Folding Cot with Side Tables and 4D Battery Pump. Connect the included 4D pump to the Double Lock valve for easy, leak-free inflation. Once you find the perfect firmness, the AirTight system will help keep it that way through the night, since it's factory-tested to be leak-free. The ComfortStrong coil system provides all-night support. It is more than a place to sleep with 2 side tables with cup holders to easily place your drink, a snack, a magazine, or personal items on both sides of the bed. A sewn-in cover keeps the airbed in place on the strong steel frame. When youre ready to pack up, the Double Lock valve lets you deflate the airbed just as easily, and it folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.
data.reviewText: Developed a leak after 1 use. Took extra care when inflating and made sure nothing sharp was on the ground. Unreliable Junk.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Soft Plush Top Inflated Quickbed

DESCRIPTION:
Take the comfort of an indoor bed with you when you sleep outside on the Coleman Queen Airbed Folding Cot with Side Tables and 4D Battery Pump. Connect the included 4D pump to the Double Lock valve for easy, leak-free inflation. Once you find the perfect firmness, the AirTight system will help keep it that way through the night, since it's factory-tested to be leak-free. The ComfortStrong coil system provides all-night support. It is more than a place to sleep with 2 side tables with cup holders to easily place your drink, a snack, a magazine, or personal items on both sides of the bed. A sewn-in cover keeps the airbed in place on the strong steel frame. When youre ready to pack up, the Double Lock valve lets you deflate the airbed just as easily, and it folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.

REVIEW:
Developed a leak after 1 use. Took extra care when inflating and made sure nothing sharp was on the ground. Unreliable Junk.

data.title: Coleman Quad LED Lantern Special Edition Ultra Bright 190 Lumens, Red
data.description:
Take the convenience of four lights in one with you with the Coleman Quad LED Lantern. Together the lantern shines 190 ultra-bright lumens for up to 75 hours. During an emergency, pop one of the four lights off the base for a personal flashlight. They recharge once theyre back on the base for hands-free light. The 24 LEDs last a lifetime, so they never need replacing and the lantern runs cool so its always safe to touch, even when its been on for hours. Combining an area light with four portable lanterns in a single clever unit, the Coleman LED Quad lantern is a versatile choice for indoor or outdoor use. The Quad is equipped with four removable LED panels that hold 24 LED lights total. Users can remove any of the four panels and use them independently, such as when needing a portable light for the bathroom or tent, or they can keep all four attached to the lantern and produce 190 total lumens of light. As a result, the Quad is the perfect light for group camping trips and any other occasion where folks might splinter off into smaller groups during the night. Each of the panels is a fully functioning light, with six 5mm white LEDs, a rechargeable NiMH battery, an independent on/off switch, and a top handle for carrying or hanging. The NiMH battery--which recharges when stored in the lantern base--provides up to 1.5 hours of light on its own. The lantern base, meanwhile, requires eight D-cell batteries (not included), which provide an approximate run time of 75 hours for the entire lantern. Other features include a main on/off switch located on top of the lantern, a light range of 26 feet, and a limited five-year warranty. About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
data.reviewText:
Pretty pricey and doesn't give off nearly as much light as a fuel lantern. Wouldn't buy again for the price. Would go with the propane lanterns all day over this if you want brightness. big and bulky and batteries burn up fast.

-g

data.title: Coleman High Stand,20.25" H x 18.75" W x 28" L
data.description: Coleman 2000020280 High Stand. Camping Furniture. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping Furniture
data.reviewText: I will start by sayingthatI LOVE the Coleman brand. But this is trully a horrible grilling stand. First of all the rubber or whatever the black part melted within 15 minutes of using it. Also the stands is flimsy and will slide open. Now I might have gotten  a defected one but i doubt it.  It has no support and my  grill kept falling right out.  It is therefore very dangerous.  I really wanted to love it, as like I mentioned before I love the Coleman brand. 9y% of my camping equipment is from Coleman. But I can not recommend this stand to anyone.  I have 3 small children and I  jusy don't feel comfortable using it around them. . Or anyone for that matter. I wish we would have just put our money towards a more sturdy and bigger  fold up station to begin with. I took it to one 4 day camping trip came home put it away to maybe think of a different use. But it's been so long that honestly I'll probsbly end up throwing it away. I guess there's a first time for everything,  cause for the first time I'm dissapointed with this brand.

data.title: Coleman Elite Perfectflow Propane Lantern
data.description: Reliable, extended-run outdoor illumination can be yours with the Coleman Deluxe Propane Lantern. The 2-mantle design of this lantern creates a steady, bright glow of up to 1000 lumens of light that reaches up to 23 meters away. A quick match strike is all you need to get your lantern started, then simply dial in the perfect brightness with the adjustable control knob. Once your lantern is lit, the footed base provides stability when placed on a table, and the bail handle allows for easy hanging. No matter where you go, the PerfectFlow pressure control technology produces a steady fuel stream and consistent performance in all kinds of weather.
data.reviewText: I love this lantern and the travel case keeps it nice and secure!

data.title: Coleman Rainfly Accessory for 6-Person Instant Tent
data.description:
Get better airflow with the Coleman Rainfly Accessory for 6-Person Instant Tent. This rainfly for the Coleman 6-Person Instant Tent, 10 x 9, allows you to crack your windows during a downpour and still stay dry. Get better airflow when camping in your Coleman Instant six-person tent with this Instant tent rainfly. Coleman tents are well sealed and protected from the rain, so campers sometime lose airflow when it starts to pour. Designed for Coleman's 10-by-9-foot Instant tents, the rainfly not only provides added protection from the weather, but it also allows you to crack your windows during a storm and still stay dry. Plus, the rainfly creates a spacious vestibule outside--perfect for stowing shoes and other gear.

data.title: Coleman Hooligan Backpacking Tent
data.description: The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..
data.reviewText: Easy setup, spacy inside for one, but a little cramped for one adult and two kids (under 8). Condensation buildup leaves the inside of the fly wet, but on the part slanted away from you so it does not drip on your sleeping area. Overall a great tent. Was able to stow back in the case with no issues on the first time.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Hooligan Backpacking Tent

DESCRIPTION:
The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..

REVIEW:
Easy setup, spacy inside for one, but a little cramped for one adult and two kids (under 8). Condensation buildup leaves the inside of the fly wet, but on the part slanted away from you so it does not drip on your sleeping area. Overall a great tent. Was able to stow back in the case with no issues on the first time.

data.title: Coleman Compression Sack
data.description: Whether you're packing or storing your gear, reduce your bulk with a Coleman Compression Sack. Its unique design compresses large sleeping bags or other soft items with three straps that tighten around the outside. When you're ready to go, the sturdy web handle on the bottom makes one-handed carrying simple.
data.reviewText: When i went to put my bag in the sack the middle strap apparently was either defective or of terrible quality that the yellow strap itself tore at the buckle. I am very disappointed in this product, Coleman is usually very good. I do not recommend this sack to anyone and will not buy another.

data.title: Coleman 100-Quart Xtreme 5-Day Heavy-Duty Cooler with Wheels, Blue
data.description:
Food, drinksand the funlast longer, when you roll in with the Coleman 100-Quart Xtreme 5-Day Heavy-Duty Cooler with Wheels. To be exact, this cooler keeps ice up to 5 days at temps as high as 90F thanks to an insulated lid and extra insulation in the walls. Large enough to hold 160 cans, this spacious cooler transports and chills enough food and drinks so the entire party remains fueled and refreshed for the duration of your adventures. Wherever youre headedcampgrounds, tailgate parking lot, or across a ball fieldthe heavy-duty wheels and large tow handle let you roll over almost any terrain with little effort. The additional 2-way side handles make it easier to lift your cooler in and out of the car or onto a picnic bench. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid ensures you have a place to sit and relax, and the cup holders molded into the lid keep your drink close and prevent spills. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain lets you empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so youre ready for your next fun adventure in no time. Carry up to 160 cans with ease--and store ice for up to five days even when it's 90 degrees outside--in the Xtreme 5 100-Quart Wheeled Cooler by Coleman. With two large wheels, two-way handles and a comfortable tow handle for one-hand operation, this cooler is easy to roll even on rough terrain. After the party, it's easy to drain thanks to a rustproof, leak-resistant channel drain for no-tilt draining. Features:
  • Keeps ice up to 5 days at 90 degrees Fahrenheit
  • Holds 160 cans
  • Hinged lid with beverage holders
  • Two-way handles for flexible easy carrying
  • Comfortable tow handle for one-hand operation
  • Rustproof, leak-resistant channel drain for no-tilt easy draining
  • Two large wheels for easy pulling, even on rough terrain
  • Made with Thermozone insulation that contains no toxic CFCs, HFCs, or HCFCs
Specifications:
  • Exterior Dimensions: 36.5 by 16.75 by 18.25 inches
  • Interior Dimensions: 23.75 by 11.75 by 13 inches
  • Weight Empty: 18 pounds
  • Made in the USA
About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
data.reviewText: I like that I like it so much I purchased two more they're awesome

data.description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. data.title: Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium
data.description: Take your Coleman stove wherever outdoor adventures lead you with the Coleman Camp Stove Carry Case, Medium. Designed to fit Coleman 2-burner stoves measuring up to 21.5 x 14 x 4.8 inches, this rugged carry case made from PVC-coated polyester protects your stove during transportation and storage. Strong web handles provide comfort when toting stoves between campsites, while the durable zipper is designed to keep stoves safe and dry. Two propane pouches with drawstrings securely carry extra fuel canisters (sold separately).
data.reviewText: Fits my Triton with room enough to spare for the griddle and a few extra things in there as well...small cooking utensil sent, and an enamel grill cover (for open fire cooking).  Like how it holds 2 propane tanks.  Quality is decent...zipper has held up so far so good after about 6 trips.

data.title: Coleman Men's 35mm PVC/Poly Rain Suit
data.description: Keep yourself reliably dry and protected from the elements with the Coleman Men-Inchs PVC/Poly Rain Suit. Constructed of durable, waterproof 35mm PVC-coated polyester, the Rain Suit includes a rain jacket and pants. The jacket features a drawstring hood, center front zipper with storm flap to keep out moisture, back and armhole vents for air flow, and two lower pockets. The pants feature a drawstring elasticized waist for a good fit, leg openings with zipper closure & snap adjustment, articulated knees for ease of movement, and 2 convenient slit pockets that give you access to pockets on the pants you wear underneath. The Rain Suit stores compactly in the included carry bag.
data.reviewText: WAY TOO HEAVY FOR BACKPACKING AND WAS SOLD THAT WAY... SAD IT CANT BE RETUNED. IT IS WAAAAYNTO HEAVY FOR BACKPACKING.  It is good quality

data.title: Coleman Converta Cot
data.description: The Coleman Converta Cot provides comfortable seating at the campsite or in the backyard. Four back position and two foot positions for use as a lounge chair or cot.Unfolded Dimensions: 76 in. x 26 in. x 15.5 in..Folded Dimensions: 27.8 in. x 25 in. x 4.9 in..
data.reviewText:
These cots are horrible. I ordered one, used it for 4 nights and it broke (2 of the brackets got warped and the backing no longer would stand up on its own). Coleman sent me another one to replace it, and that new one broke after 2 nights of use.

These cots are horrible. Buyer beware.

data.title: Coleman Montana 6-1239;x739; 6 Person Tent
data.description: The Montana 6 tent from Coleman sleeps 6 campers and includes 1 large 'D' style door for easy entry/exit with a hooded fly to provide ventilation even in rain. A large hooded awning over the front door provides airflow for cross ventilation as well as nice place to lounge out of sun or rain.. Mesh vents on the roof provide additional ventilation and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against a leaky floor.Polyester fly snd wall fabric (450mm coating) are tough and durable..Windows and roof vents for maximum ventilation and comfort.Mesh roof aids in ventilation and reduces condensation.Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.Polyester fly is tough and durable and won't stretch when wet.1 zippered Electrical Access Port to run AC power into the tent.1 vented Cool Air Port for increased ventilation and comfort.1 interior storage pocket.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.Polyethylene welcome mat for muddy shoes.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Combination clips and continuous pole sleeves for a quick easy set up every time.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..
data.reviewText:
I was so proud to own a Coleman tent, reviewing the website on how they test each tent though the rain & wind. The majority of my camping/tailgating gears are Coleman products.
I went camping and it rained, of course; the tent was so comfortable,  I looked up and saw the rain guard working, leaving the rain on the outside of the tent. That made me smile, then I noticed in all 4 corners of the tent water is coming into the tent.
I was so disappointed. Coleman finally failed me!
Please refund

data.title: Coleman 16-Piece Cutlery Set
data.description: Coleman 2000015163 utensils 16 pc plastic. Camping cooking supplies cookware. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping cooking supplies cookware
data.reviewText:
These are truly made of sturdy material and the knives can cut fruit easily. Since I rarely check baggage, I cannot bring any sort of real knife with me onto the plane. These won't replace metal utensils but the polycarbonate cutlery is lightweight yet stiff enough for eating meals on the road and outdoors.

Good price for something re-usable and of this quality. As another reviewer mentioned, the utensils are a bit long but I can fit them into a quart-sized Freezer Ziplock bag. I wrap napkins over the tips of the knife and fork before storing them, to avoid puncturing the plastic bag.

data.title: Coleman 16-Quart Personal Wheeled Cooler, Blue
data.description:
Keep your food and drinks cold, and keep the fun going, for up to 2 days when you roll in with a Coleman 16 Quart Performance Wheeled Cooler. Large enough to hold 22 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for several people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or across the ball field, the recessed wheels and long, telescoping handle let you roll up with hardly any effort. The additional molded handles make it easy to lift your cooler in and out of the car or onto a picnic bench. Coleman provides a convenient way to keep things cold, even when you're on-the-go, with the 16-Quart Personal Wheeled Cooler. This convenient cooler can hold up to 22 12-ounce cans or two 2-liter bottles upright and features traditional Coleman construction for rugged durability. Other features include an extendable handle that retracts for convenient storage and recessed wheels for easy transport to and from your favorite sporting events and outdoor activities. This durable Coleman cooler comes with a limited manufacturer's warranty. About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
data.reviewText: It's fine if you're going to "drag" it behind or push it in front of you.  It does not have provision to carry with one hand

data.title: Coleman Soft Plush Top Inflated Quickbed
data.description: Take the comfort of an indoor bed with you when you sleep outside on the Coleman Queen Airbed Folding Cot with Side Tables and 4D Battery Pump. Connect the included 4D pump to the Double Lock valve for easy, leak-free inflation. Once you find the perfect firmness, the AirTight system will help keep it that way through the night, since it's factory-tested to be leak-free. The ComfortStrong coil system provides all-night support. It is more than a place to sleep with 2 side tables with cup holders to easily place your drink, a snack, a magazine, or personal items on both sides of the bed. A sewn-in cover keeps the airbed in place on the strong steel frame. When youre ready to pack up, the Double Lock valve lets you deflate the airbed just as easily, and it folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.
data.reviewText: Not comfortable at all for two people to sleep on. Used it once and then upgraded to a double high Intex mattress.

When youre ready to pack up, the Double Lock valve lets you deflate the airbed just as easily, and it folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.

REVIEW:
Not comfortable at all for two people to sleep on. Used it once and then upgraded to a double high Intex mattress.

data.title: Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
data.description: The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It holds 16 cans inside, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! Sporting an adjustable shoulder strap, the cooler is soft on the outside for comfortable carrying, and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect your food from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides antimicrobial protection, to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
data.reviewText: I really like this bag except for one problem, it really is a pain to carry. I didn't think about the strap and not having a handle. It is very awkward trying to carry it, if this had a handle on the top (the way men would carry it) this would be five stars. I don't want to wear it as a purse and the strap is too long and wide to use as a carry handle. I end up carrying it by the bungee straps and it bounces the whole time. One more thing about this that bugs me is the zipper, why do they build this so the top section lining sticks out when unzipped, I have to shove it back in when trying to rezip it closed. Besides those issues I really do like it, I love the size, it can fit everything I need with no problem.
data.text:

Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner

DESCRIPTION:
The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. I really like this bag except for one problem, it really is a pain to carry. I didn't think about the strap and not having a handle. Besides those issues I really do like it, I love the size, it can fit everything I need with no problem.

data.title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
data.description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
data.reviewText: Seems nice BUT there is a warranty IF you register your product on line - GOOD LUCK with that.  After about 20 minutes on hold I got a person who said she would send me an email - they want pictures of the grill and a copy of the receipt.  I'm sure the computer wizards could do this but being 76, I don't have a clue. So when it fails and or needs parts I guess I'll just throw it away and buy a new one.  So much for CUSTOMER SERVICE.

data.title: Coleman WeatherMaster 6-Person Tent with Screen Room
data.description:
Watch nature unfold before your eyes in Coleman WeatherMaster 6-Person Tent with Screen Room. During the day, the screen room lets you enjoy the great outdoors away from bugs and can be used on warmer nights for extra sleeping space. If it rains, this tent keeps you dry thanks to WeatherTec technology, which uses a tub-like floor with patented corner welds, protected seams, and a covered zipper to help keep water out. Meanwhile, the strong frame is tested to withstand 35+ mph winds. Additionally, an angled window keeps rain out while allowing for extra air circulation. A hinged door makes for easy coming and going. Setup is simple with snag-free, continuous pole sleeves and a patented pin-and-ring system. Inside, there's enough room to stretch out on 2 queen-size airbeds, and storage pockets keep small items organized and off the floor. When it's time to head home, the tent easily packs up into an expandable carry bag with a rip strip for extra storage until you're off on your next adventure.


A patent-pending hinged door provides easy entry and exit, and a touch of at-home convenience.
The Coleman WeatherMaster 6 Tent has two rooms and plenty of space for the entire family. Up to six campers can sleep easily inside thanks to the 17-by-nine (W x D) footprint and 6 ft. 10 in. center height. Two doors�including a patent-pending hinged front door�offer easy in-and-out. An additional floor-less screened room provides extra ventilation on warm days, a great place for meals and gathering, rain or shine, and protected storage space. Coleman's Comfort System allows excellent ventilation control via Variflow adjustable airflow, a vented Cool-Air privacy Port, privacy vent window, and all-mesh ceiling. A convenient electrical access port lets you run a cord from your device in the tent to an outside power source, while an interior gear pocket helps you keep things organized. Setup is quick and simple thanks two color-coded poles and continuous pole sleeves, shock-corded fiberglass poles, an exclusive pin-and-ring design, and InstaClip attachments. Straightforward instructions are sewn into the convenient carry bag, and separate stake and pole bags are also included. Coleman's WeatherTec System
This proprietary series of interworking features keeps the weather where it belongs�outside the tent�at all times.
  • Leak-free Seams: In addition to fully-taped rainfly seams, the rainfly covers doors and windows, and incorporates easy-to-use Velcro frame attachments
  • Weather-resistant Fabric: Coated polyester fabric combined with anti-wicking thread, webbing, and zippers are designed to keep you dry
  • Protected Seams: Inverted floor seams dramatically increase weather resistance by hiding needle holes inside the tent, away from the elements
  • Waterproof Floors: Welding technology strengthens the tent floor and eliminates needle holes
  • Zipper Protection: Zipper cuff adds protection from the elements to the door
  • Wind Strong Frame: Engineered to be a stronger, more wind-responsive frame by using redesigned poles and guy-out triangles to anchor tents and increase performance
Specifications
  • 75-denier polyester taffeta fly
  • 68-denier polyester mesh inner tent
  • 1,000-denier polyethylene floor
  • 19-millimeter steel poles
The Coleman Limited Warranty
Coleman has been in business for more than 100 years, and continues to produce high-quality, affordable tents, lanterns, table-top stoves, and more. All Coleman products have a warranty against defects in material and workmanship, and the WeatherMaster 6 Tent includes a limited one-year manufacturer's warranty. About Coleman Outdoor Products
More than 100 years ago, an entrepreneurial young man named W.C. Coleman had an idea for manufacturing better lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. A century later, Coleman's current catalog features a wide-ranging array of products that make spending time outside a pleasure. The company crafts coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days, airbeds that are comfortable and won't deflate during the night, a complete line of bright and long-lasting LED lights, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and more.
data.reviewText:
This tent was AMAZING until it leaked!  After owning this tent and caring for it like a baby for 3 years it began to leak.  I water proofed and seam-sealed like no tomorrow, waking to a puddle after every rain.  Here is the flaw.  The fly does not pull tight enough to keep it from touching the screen top and therefor... leaks.

Bummer because I love the design.. windows that self roll, light inside, hinged door and screened porch.  They need to design a different pole system to keep the fly off of the screen.

data.title: Coleman Soft Plush Top Inflated Quickbed
data.description: Take the comfort of an indoor bed with you when you sleep outside on the Coleman Queen Airbed Folding Cot with Side Tables and 4D Battery Pump. Connect the included 4D pump to the Double Lock valve for easy, leak-free inflation. Once you find the perfect firmness, the AirTight system will help keep it that way through the night, since it's factory-tested to be leak-free. The ComfortStrong coil system provides all-night support. It is more than a place to sleep with 2 side tables with cup holders to easily place your drink, a snack, a magazine, or personal items on both sides of the bed. A sewn-in cover keeps the airbed in place on the strong steel frame. When youre ready to pack up, the Double Lock valve lets you deflate the airbed just as easily, and it folds up into a carry bag for easy transport and storage.
data.reviewText: I love coleman stuff.  But my first one came and had a leak somewhere.  I had to get a replacement.  Luckily Amazon is amazing and helped me replace it for free.  The new one is still in the box.  I'm hoping it doesn't leak also.  Otherwise, it's a GREAT air mattress.  Very comfortable and the new valve style is really cool!  You don't have to rush to plug it back up.  It is more of a check valve so when nothing is inserted it plugs itself.

data.title: Coleman Steel-Belted Portable Cooler, 54 Quart
data.description: Go back in time with cold food and drinks today when you take a Coleman 54 Quart Steel Belted Cooler along with you. It looks just like the one you remember with its classic design first developed in 1954. Large enough to hold 85 cans and tall enough to hold 2-liter bottles upright, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip steel handles and stainless steel lid latch make getting to your destination easy, comfortable and secure. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax while you enjoy the day with a cold drink in hand. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. A Coleman Steel Belted Cooler will rekindle your fondest outdoor memories  and equip you to make many new ones.
data.reviewText: Product came damaged, had to return. Not willing to try again.

data.reviewText: If I had wanted a griddle, I would have purchased a griddle. The grate is 3/4 griddle and 1/4 grate for barbeque. I grill large (and thick) quality steaks and enjoy the flavor of the flame barbeque. My steaks, with this grill, due to the grate, are 1/4 barbequed and 3/4 fried. Haven't been able to find a proper grate to fit this grill. (The quality of the grill is very good).

data.title: Coleman Rainfly Accessory for 6-Person Instant Tent
data.description:
Get better airflow with the Coleman Rainfly Accessory for 6-Person Instant Tent. This rainfly for the Coleman 6-Person Instant Tent, 10 x 9, allows you to crack your windows during a downpour and still stay dry. Get better airflow when camping in your Coleman Instant six-person tent with this Instant tent rainfly. Coleman tents are well sealed and protected from the rain, so campers sometime lose airflow when it starts to pour. Designed for Coleman's 10-by-9-foot Instant tents, the rainfly not only provides added protection from the weather, but it also allows you to crack your windows during a storm and still stay dry. Plus, the rainfly creates a spacious vestibule outside--perfect for stowing shoes and other gear.

data.title: Coleman Hooligan Backpacking Tent
data.description: The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..
data.reviewText:
Firstly, for the price this tent is worth it ($70 on amazon prime). I took this tent into a moderately difficult portaging/canoeing trip into the bwca in MN. It was perfect for the trip. Not too heavy and the packed shape isn't too cumbersome given the size and features. I was pleased.  The best feature of this tent is the expansive vestibule of the rainfly. It features a main one near the front and small ones along the other three sides. Helped a ton during some pretty nasty thunderstorms.  Combine it with a heavy duty tarp for the base and you and your gear will be bone dry.

Now for some suggestions:
The main criticism is that the way the tent is pitched has changed a bit and the instructions need to be updated.  The rod for the vestibule is no longer guided through sleeves but through velcro straps.  The same type of straps are used to secure the rest of the rainfly to the main tent rods. Practice before you take this tent out! It will not be intuitively obvious which straps go to which rod.

Second criticism: There is no loop at the top of the tent interior to hang a lantern/light source. This just seems like a missed product oppurtunity but friends have informed me that I could sew a loop on. Not sure if i'm willing to risk the integrity of the tent mesh though.

DESCRIPTION:
The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..

REVIEW:
Firstly, for the price this tent is worth it ($70 on amazon prime). I took this tent into a moderately difficult portaging/canoeing trip into the bwca in MN. It was perfect for the trip. Not too heavy and the packed shape isn't too cumbersome given the size and features. I was pleased.  The best feature of this tent is the expansive vestibule of the rainfly. It features a main one near the front and small ones along the other three sides. Helped a ton during some pretty nasty thunderstorms.  Combine it with a heavy duty tarp for the base and you and your gear will be bone dry.

Now for some suggestions:
The main criticism is that the way the tent is pitched has changed a bit and the instructions need to be updated.  The rod for the vestibule is no longer guided through sleeves but through velcro straps.  The same type of straps are used to secure the rest of the rainfly to the main tent rods. Practice before you take this tent out! It will not be intuitively obvious which straps go to which rod.

Second criticism: There is no loop at the top of the tent interior to hang a lantern/light source. This just seems like a missed product oppurtunity but friends have informed me that I could sew a loop on. Not sure if i'm willing to risk the integrity of the tent mesh though.

data.title: Coleman 1-Gallon Jug
data.description: Keep enough ice-cold water to stay cool and hydrated on sweltering days with a Coleman 1 Gallon Beverage Cooler. The wide mouth top makes for easy filling, including adding ice by the handful. The flip spout makes grabbing a quick drink easy, and it won't snag open to better prevent spills. The bail handle makes carrying easy, and the screw-top lid stays secure, so no matter where you go you'll always have a refreshing drink ready for you.
data.reviewText: I bought this to use during the day while at work. I do like that it holds a gallon, which is more than enough for most people. I have not had any problems with it leaking, from what I can tell the seals are all still very tight. I have been using this jug for a little over a month now. My one issue with this product is that the lid is not insulated. The inside of the cooler is very  insulated, the walls look to be over an inch thick. The inner insulation, however, is somewhat lost by the lack of insulation on the lid. Because of this, the heat from the day can get into the cooler and warm up the contents rather quickly. The lid also "sweats" because of the lack of insulation, which makes it seem like the whole thing is leaking. Overall, it's a decent product, but nothing special. I would recommend something with an insulated lid if you are concerned with keeping things cold/hot.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman 1-Gallon Jug

DESCRIPTION:
Keep enough ice-cold water to stay cool and hydrated on sweltering days with a Coleman 1 Gallon Beverage Cooler. The wide mouth top makes for easy filling, including adding ice by the handful. The flip spout makes grabbing a quick drink easy, and it won't snag open to better prevent spills. The bail handle makes carrying easy, and the screw-top lid stays secure, so no matter where you go you'll always have a refreshing drink ready for you.

REVIEW:
I bought this to use during the day while at work. I do like that it holds a gallon, which is more than enough for most people. I have not had any problems with it leaking, from what I can tell the seals are all still very tight. I have been using this jug for a little over a month now. My one issue with this product is that the lid is not insulated. The inside of the cooler is very  insulated, the walls look to be over an inch thick. The inner insulation, however, is somewhat lost by the lack of insulation on the lid. Because of this, the heat from the day can get into the cooler and warm up the contents rather quickly. The lid also "sweats" because of the lack of insulation, which makes it seem like the whole thing is leaking. Overall, it's a decent product, but nothing special. I would recommend something with an insulated lid if you are concerned with keeping things cold/hot.

data.title: Coleman 2-Person Pop-Up Tent
data.description: Great for festivals and car camping, the Coleman 2-Person Pop-Up Tent sets up in as little as 10 seconds, letting you get back to the fun. This camping tent is uniquely designed with preassembled poles, allowing the tent to pop into place in a snap. The taped floor seams keep you dry even when the ground is soaking wet, while the multi-position rainfly allows you to find the perfect balance of protection and ventilation. This instant tent offers room for two camp pads and comes with two integrated storage pockets to help you keep small items organized. This 2-person tent folds flat for simple storage and is lightweight for easy portability.
data.reviewText:
My boyfriend bought this tent at the last minute for a camping trip we took last weekend. We both grew to hate it. It is super easy to set up, it popped open no problem-all we had to do was stake it down. My biggest complaint is the DOOR! The material is pulled so tight that the zipper is nearly impossible to open and close. I am surprised neither of us ripped it out of frustration. Also we got rained on the first night. The tent gets an A+ for no leaks, but every time we opened the door the water would just fall down into our tent---and since the tent was so small on the inside, of course the water went right into our bed. Also a side note about the size of the tent---There is no way you could fit 4 people in there. It barely had enough room for the 2 of us and neither of us are very big.

Folding it down looked confusing, but he seemed to do it pretty easily. I've heard rumors that the springs tend to break after more than 1 use. If we decide to use this tent again I will have to update my review.

data.title: Coleman Cold Glow Cooler Light
data.description: You'll always be able to find your favorite drink when you light up your cooler with the Coleman cold glow cooler light. It easily installs on the underside of your cooler lid to provide 50 lumens of light. Once attached, you can set it to the auto-on Mode and the motion-sensing technology will turn on your light when you open the lid and turn it off when you close the lid. Perfectly designed for use inside your cooler, it's water-resistant and the LEDs run cool so they won't contribute to ice melt.
data.reviewText: Battery came out during the ride , and the light got wet , and does not work after the first trip .
data.text:

You'll always be able to find your favorite drink when you light up your cooler with the Coleman cold glow cooler light. data.title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
data.description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
data.reviewText: Excellent grill! Works great, stores and cleans easily! One small propane canister has already lasted for ten meals and still going!

data.title: Coleman Xtreme Cooler, 28-Quart, Dark Gray/Orange/Light Gray Overmold
data.description: Keep your food and drinks cold for an extended time, and make the fun last longer, when you bring a Coleman 28 Quart Xtreme Cooler. Xtreme technology uses an insulated lid and extra insulation in the walls to keep your items cold for up to 3 days. Large enough to hold 36 cans, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for the entire party. Whether you're headed on a long weekend camping trip, a roadtrip, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip no-crush handles make getting to your destination easy and comfortable. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax, and the cup holders molded into the lid will keep your cold drink close while you enjoy the day.
data.reviewText: It's a good cooler for an afternoon or tailgate . . . I wanted a spigot instead of a drain plug, and it would work as a water cooler as well . . . and I could carry it in my truck for ice water on the job sites . . .

data.title: Coleman 2000014864 Mosquito Head Net
data.description: Enjoy the outdoors without the pests when you're wearing a Coleman Mosquito Head Net. The fine mesh stops insects from biting, while still allowing you to see nature's beauty. data.title: Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue
data.description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
data.reviewText: I've owned two of these, and both died premature deaths. The first one cracked (okay, let's try and be a little more careful...but it wasn't abused), the second one had a spout that never did thread on right--it was as if it was missing a thread or two. So if you get the right one, I suppose it might suffice for basic, non-rugged duty water carrying, but inspect closely before paying(I guess that means you're out of luck if you buy online).

The first one cracked (okay, let's try and be a little more careful...but it wasn't abused), the second one had a spout that never did thread on right--it was as if it was missing a thread or two. So if you get the right one, I suppose it might suffice for basic, non-rugged duty water carrying, but inspect closely before paying(I guess that means you're out of luck if you buy online).

data.title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
data.description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
data.reviewText:
I'm quite disappointed with this product. I expected more but found myself wanting something different. First, if you make coffee on your stove I hope you use a very very large cauldron... because a normal coffee pot will not work on this product. I purchased the swaptop stove grate for this, but the burner is just too wide for smaller items (the heat will just go around it).

The portable propane tanks last enough time for making breakfast and maybe dinner (you'll go through a can a day... (i was only cooking for 1 person).

I wanted flexibility... to be able to grill and use my cast-iron... but I'm thinking it's better to just go with one of the small campstoves instead of using this grill.

Don't get me wrong.. works okay for some things... but the heat distribution is going to mess with your mind if you're a avid griller...

data.title: Coleman Exponent F1 Ultralight Stove
data.description: Remarkably compact and efficient, the Coleman F1 UltraLight stove weighs a mere 2.7 ounces. But dont let its diminutive size and weight deceive you -- it packs a powerful wallop with a 16,000-BTU burner. The F1 UltraLight stove boils a quart of water in less than three minutes. It's fully and easily adjustable from low-simmer to high. The F1 UltraLight is fueled by standard butane/propane cartridges, such as Colemans model 3250 resealable, threaded canister with 7.75 ounces of fuel (not included). Burn time for the F1 UltraLight stove is up to 50 minutes on high, 120 minutes on low (per 230-gram cartridge). It features three serrated pot supports that fold together for an even smaller package to store and carry. Stuff sack included. Comes with a limited lifetime warranty. Get ready for serious cooking on the trails with the Coleman Exponent 9741-700 F1 Powerboost camp stove, which weighs an amazingly light 2.7 ounces. It offers fully adjustable heat up to 16,400 BTUs and can boil a liter of water in 3 minutes and 40 seconds. Thanks to Coleman's PerfectFlow feature, it's regulated for a constant, consistent burn (without flaring or flickering). Other features include a push-button electronic ignition for matchless lighting and serrated pan supports that fold away for compact storage. It uses resealable butane/propane cartridges (cartridge not included), and one 220-gram cartridge will provide up to 50 minutes on high or two hours on low setting.
data.reviewText:
I've gotten about two years use out of this stove.  It is small and lightweight.  The three prongs that hold pots do require some fiddling with each time the stove is assembled.  If done improperly, their spacing will be uneven creating a situation where a pot could fall off.  Pay attention and it'll work.  Then again, if you're outside and it's really cold, assembling the prongs is a pain.  I have never had something fall off of the stove, so the prongs are strong enough to hold reasonable sized pots of water.

Unfortunately, the stove stopped working.  After returning home from a hunting trip early because we could not cook food, I hooked it up and it ran fine.  Back to the woods, and it stopped working again after two meals.  A canister change didn't solve the problem.  Fuel flow would start, the stove would light, then it'd stop.

So, the stove works for awhile.  Then, it's gonna fail.  I'm in the market for another stove and will not buy this model again.
