data.title: Coleman 9-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
data.description: Keep food and drinks cold with the Coleman Soft Cooler. This compact, portable cooler bag holds up to nine cans and offers plenty of space for a family picnic or game-day snacks. Heat-welded seams in the zippered main compartment prevent leaks and maintain a cold environment, while the removable hard plastic liner fits snugly inside the soft cooler and allows you to easily dump out any ice melt. When not using the hard plastic liner, you can use ice substitutes to keep contents cold and dry. The cooler bag's easy-clean interior has an antimicrobial lining to resist formation of mold, mildew, fungus, and odor. A zippered front pocket, pocket under the lid, and two side mesh pockets make it easy to carry water bottles, snacks, silverware, and other accessories. You can also secure items to the top with the convenient bungee cords built into the lid. An adjustable shoulder strap lets you comfortably carry the cooler anywhere you go.
data.reviewText: Really like the bag. Appears well made.

data.description: Don't miss a shower  even when you're camping  with the Coleman 5-Gallon Solar Shower. The reservoir holds up to 5 gallons of waterenough for multiple showers. It's constructed of heat-locking material that warms the water when it's left in the sun, even on cool days. data.title: Coleman Beach Shade
data.description: " Take your own shady, private space to the beach or park with the Coleman Beach Shade. This pop-up beach tent is made with UVGuard material that offers 50+ UPF protection from the suns harmful rays and durable Polyguard material that is designed to last season after season. The extended floor can be zipped shut for privacy while changing clothes, and the dry line offers a convenient place to hang wet bathing suits and towels. Integrated storage pockets give you a secure place to put your items while you swim or sunbathe. And when it gets hot, the back window can be unzipped to let the breeze in, while the sand bag compartments can be filled as needed to anchor the beach canopy on windy days. The Coleman Beach Shade comes with ground stakes and pre-attached guy lines and can be set up in about five minutes.
data.reviewText: This is a great tent for the beach. I can set it up by myself in <10min. I used it in the outer banks and it was fairly windy but if you dig down and really bury the sand anchors it has no issue in the wind. It packs down to nothing (the bag is a little bigger then a cling wrap box) which is great when you hauling everything to the beach.

data.title: Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Grill Case for LX Series Grills
data.description: Add even more portability to your Coleman RoadTrip LX Series Grill when you pack it inside a Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Case. This heavy-duty, weather-resistant case includes easy-glide wheels for more mobility and top and side handles for better control. A durable zipper and inner straps secure the grill the entire trip, and inside pockets fit accessories and condiments for whatever meal youre planning to cook up.
data.reviewText: The bag is clumsy to use.  Difficult to put the grill in the bag, and once in the bag doesn't really provide any benefit over just dragging the grill with the original wheels.  No place to store the full size griddle either.  Just two inner sleeves that may store the 1/2 grates/griddle?  No provisions for propane storage and can not leave the propane connection on the grill.  And you have to take the handle off to make it fit and then there is no place to store the handle... Not sure what's the benefit of this bag.

data.title: Coleman Sportsman Waterproof First Aid Kit, 100-Piece for boating
data.description: Campers, hikers, hunters, bikers, boaters, and other outdoor enthusiasts can rest easier with six first aid kit options available under the Coleman brand - the most trusted name in outdoor equipment. Each kit contains components that are most used and useful when you or your family needs medical attention away from home. Colemans Sportmans Waterproof First Aid Kit contains: 20 - Bandages 1" x 3", 20 - Small Bandages, 8 - Butterfly Bandages, 16 - Spot Bandages, 5 - Knuckle Bandages, 8 - Antiseptic Wipes, 4 - Sting relief Wipes, 2 - Large Safety Pins, 2 - Small Safety Pins, 4 - Antibiotic Ointments, 1 - Razor Blade, 2 - Rubber Gloves (1 pair), 6 - Gauze Pads 2" x 2", 1 - 1/2 x 2 1/2 Yards Adhesive Tape, 1 - Waterproof Case.
data.reviewText: I notice that there are items inside that I will never use. Just substitute items of choice for junk that just takes up room. Convenient kit size, fits well in travel bag.

data.title: Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
data.description: The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It holds 16 cans inside, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! Sporting an adjustable shoulder strap, the cooler is soft on the outside for comfortable carrying, and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect your food from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides antimicrobial protection, to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
data.reviewText: First one I bought I struggled to unzip it the first time and once I did was greeted with a hole in the liner right above the zipper track.  Grrr.  I immediately returned and asked for a replacement.  Second one arrived (two days later, amazon is great), and I carefully as slow as I could trying my best to navigate around the corner of the top unzipped; snag!  Another hole :(. I took the hard white container out to see if the bag maybe would open and close easier, a little bit easier but definitely could forsee the zipper snagging and ripping the lining even more.  Feeling around the upper lining just above the zipper track (on the inside) I could feel a hard wire pushing forward.  Why??  This is just sooo poorly designed!  Why is this product getting such good reviews??  So I will be returning this one too and continuing my search for a cooler.  If you don't mind your bag getting holes in the liner than it seems fine otherwise.  I did not test to see how long it kept things cool but what do you expect from something small with a zipper?  If anyone knows a good cooler bag let me know ... I am looking for a zipper cooler with side pockets.  Easy sounding but hard to find thus far.

TITLE:
Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner

DESCRIPTION:
The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. First one I bought I struggled to unzip it the first time and once I did was greeted with a hole in the liner right above the zipper track.  Grrr.  I immediately returned and asked for a replacement.  Second one arrived (two days later, amazon is great), and I carefully as slow as I could trying my best to navigate around the corner of the top unzipped; snag!  Another hole :(. I took the hard white container out to see if the bag maybe would open and close easier, a little bit easier but definitely could forsee the zipper snagging and ripping the lining even more. Why is this product getting such good reviews??  So I will be returning this one too and continuing my search for a cooler.  If you don't mind your bag getting holes in the liner than it seems fine otherwise.  I did not test to see how long it kept things cool but what do you expect from something small with a zipper?  If anyone knows a good cooler bag let me know ... I am looking for a zipper cooler with side pockets.  Easy sounding but hard to find thus far.

data.title: Coleman Family Sized Classic LED Lantern
data.description: With the Coleman Family-Sized Classic LED Lantern, bigger really is brighter: the lantern is perfect for lighting up a campsite, backyard entertaining, and emergency use. With Coleman's interchangeable CPX 6 system, you can choose your power: insert 4 D batteries (not included) into the battery cartridge, or upgrade by purchasing the CPX rechargeable power pack and make your lantern a rechargeable deviceand use either option interchangeably with any Coleman CPX 6 device! The Family-Sized LED Lantern features a super-bright high-intensity LED that never needs to be replaced, with a diffuser tube for a perfect beam pattern and reduced glare. On the Low setting, it runs for up to 50 hours, and on High for up to 25 hours. The Coleman LED Lantern is weather-resistant, so it's a reliable choice to withstand the elements. The wire bail handle is convenient for carrying or hanging the lantern wherever you need it.
data.reviewText: This a great sized lantern and I really liked the two light settings (dim and high). I especially liked that it can be used with a rechargeable battery pack. We just used it on a camping trip without the rechargeable pack and used 4 D batteries. We were really disappointed in this lantern. The battery pack (with four D batteries) didn't fit snugly in the base of the lantern, so out light kept cutting out in us. We ended up duct taping the bottom of the lantern to secure a tight fit to the base so the connection would be continuous. As much as I liked the look (and the option of a rechargeable battery), I will be returning it.

data.title: Coleman 150 qt. Cooler
data.description: Built to serve the largest of groups, the Thermozone-insulated Coleman 150 qt. Cooler has room for up to 233 cans. It features a hinged lid with four cup holders and two-way handles. The hinged lid closes securely and allows for easy one-hand opening.   You know the name, and you?ll love the company. Coleman is unparalleled in the world of camping and outdoor gear. What started out as an innovation in gas-powered lamps over 100 years ago has grown to an international company that designs and constructs top-quality tents, lanterns, stoves, coolers, sleeping bags, and more. No matter what your outdoor sport: hiking, camping, fishing, hunting, boating, swimming, four-wheeling, relaxing, or tailgating, Coleman has what you need to help get you out there to enjoy it. High-quality plastic construction in blue. Thermozone insulated cooler holds up to 233 cans. Hinged lid contains 4 molded beverage holders. Features 2-way handles for easy carrying..
data.reviewText: I got this chest primarily as extra capacity to haul buffalo meat from South Dakota to Texas.  It's a supplement to a more expensive chest I already had. (There's lots of meat on a buffalo).  It kept the meat cold and mostly frozen for the trip back to Texas, not too difficult since much of the time the temperature was well below freezing for most of the trip.  There are no latches.  The friction fit of the lid keeps it closed.  It is hard to open unless there is a lot of weight in it.  With weight in it, I go to the back and lift up -  not bad at all.  When empty or near empty there is nothing to conveniently hold the bottom down while pulling the top open, - hence the 3 rating.  I do have this chest in a 70 qt and it's ok and does a good job of holding ice.  Since it's smaller, it's much easier to lift the lid but this 150 is really difficult to open.

data.title: Coleman Collapsible Chest Cooler (Color May Vary)
data.description: The Coleman Collapsible Chest Cooler offers the space and reliability of a hard-sided cooler, with the convenience of a collapsible design. The Collapsible Chest holds 72 twelve-ounce cans, with durable side walls for rigidity when the cooler is in use. Dual front pockets offer extra storage for utensils and more, while easy-access ports on top let you grab just what you need from the inside. When not in use, the Chest collapses completely flat for convenient storage and packing.
data.reviewText: I bought this cooler because of the fact that it collapses. After a few uses, the insert that makes the bottom sturdy started to smell and it wasn't as sturdy. I'm thinking that there may have been cardboard or a similar type of product inside the insert that became saturated after use. However, this IS a cooler so I wouldn't expect this to happen...

data.title: Coleman Camping First Aid Kit an All Purpose First Aid Kit for Emergencies at Home, Car, Workplace, Hiking, or Survival, 205-Pieces
data.description: The Coleman Expedition First Aid Kit is the ultimate all purpose first aid kit for larger groups or outdoor adventures. This 205 piece kit features components needed in the field, including various standard and specialty bandages, first aid tape, gauze pads, antiseptic towels, antibiotic ointment, sting relief wipes, a cold pack and common first aid tools. All the first aid supplies are organized in a zipped, durable, semi-hard case. The unique EZ Find System keeps your items organized and easy to find during an emergency. There is space in the kit for your specialized medical supplies or medications so you can fully customize this first aid kit to fit your needs. The Coleman Expedition First Aid Kit is the perfect first aid kit for your home, RV, car, bug out bag, or for groups when camping, hiking, at sporting events, workplace, and more.

data.title: Coleman Camp Oven
data.description:
Bring the joy of fresh-baked muffins, cinnamon rolls, cornbread, and other treats to any campsite with the Coleman Camp Oven. Designed to fit neatly on Coleman propane and liquid fuel camp stoves, this portable oven gives you the ability to bake treats or keep food warm while spending time outdoors. The included interior rack adjusts to 3 heights, while the easy-to-read thermometer lets you bake with confidence. This portable oven is made from smooth aluminized steel that resists corrosion and scratches and wipes clean easily, and it folds flat for convenient carrying and storage when its time to pack up camp. Camping stoves and other cooking accessories have made it possible to cook most things outdoors, but baked goods have always been out of the question. Until now, that is. Made of smooth aluminized steel, the Coleman camping oven lets you bake a batch of muffins, biscuits, or rolls right at the campsite.


The Coleman camping oven is designed to sit on a two- or three-burner camping stove.
The oven doesn't require electric or gas power to work. Instead, campers simply place the oven on top of a Coleman two- or three-burner stove, which provides all the heat you need to bake your favorite dishes. The oven also offers such baking essentials as an adjustable steel bake rack and an easy-to-read thermometer. And when you're done baking, the oven folds flat for easy storage. Made in China, the Coleman camping oven measures 12 by 12 by 12 inches (W x H x D) when standing and weighs 7 pounds. About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
data.reviewText: A good product AFTER you CUT & FIT two Pizza Stones on the bottom and middle rack to help it maintain a constant temperature.

Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. REVIEW: A good product AFTER you CUT & FIT two Pizza Stones on the bottom and middle rack to help it maintain a constant temperature.

data.title: Coleman Hooligan Backpacking Tent
data.description: The Hooligan 2 from Coleman is a 2 person backpacking tent. It features a full coverage coated polyester fly (450mm) that envelops the tent in a cocoon of protection from the harshest weather. A small front vestibule offers some storage space for extra gear and the all mesh body is great for ventilation and stargazing on nights when the weather is clear. The fly seams are sealed at the factory and the rugged 1000D polyethylene floor is a bathtub style (wraps up the sides) for extreme weather protection and has welded seams, even in the corners, to guard against leaks. Set up is with a single pole and thus could not be more simple and quick. Great for beginner backpackers, scouts and those who want to keep it simple.Non Freestanding (1 pole) design is simple to set up and take down.All mesh body for maximum ventilation and comfort and reduces condensation.Zippered back vent in the fly helps to keep the tent comfortable - adjustable through zipper on the back tent wall.Sturdy 11mm (1ea) Shockcorded fiberglass frame for easy set up.All mesh body is perfect for stargazing on nice nights.Full coverage fly is perfect for harsh weather.1 Small storage vestibule - 6 sq. ft. - good for boots etc..1 interior storage pocket.Easy convenient continuous pole sleeve construction.Pin and ring pole to body connection is fast and simple.External guy points to keep the tent stable in storms and high winds.Instructions sewn to carry bag so they are easy to find and hard to lose.All carry sacks and stakes included.Includes convenient flashlight loop on the ceiling.Fire retardant.Import..

data.title: Coleman Camping Coffee Maker
data.description: Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. END
data.reviewText:
We purchased one of these at WALMART before a camping trip. I have a 2 burner Ozark camp stove that has a wide grill over the burners. In order to get the coffee maker onto the fire, I had to remove the grill from the stove and set the coffee maker right on the frame over the burner. With the burner on high, even the slightest breeze stopped the coffee maker from getting enough heat to make coffee. It took over 1/2 hour to get a pot of coffee. Inside a camper or in the house over a gas stove I think it would work better. Outside a tent, with a cold breeze, this unit is USELESS. My first cup of coffee was made in my canteen cup over a can of gel camp fuel.
 I'm not totally disappointed in the coffee maker as it did eventually make a pot of coffee. I'll keep it as a back up for the house should we loose power.
data.text:
TITLE:
Coleman Camping Coffee Maker

DESCRIPTION:
Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. END

REVIEW:
We purchased one of these at WALMART before a camping trip. I have a 2 burner Ozark camp stove that has a wide grill over the burners. In order to get the coffee maker onto the fire, I had to remove the grill from the stove and set the coffee maker right on the frame over the burner. With the burner on high, even the slightest breeze stopped the coffee maker from getting enough heat to make coffee. It took over 1/2 hour to get a pot of coffee. Inside a camper or in the house over a gas stove I think it would work better. Outside a tent, with a cold breeze, this unit is USELESS. My first cup of coffee was made in my canteen cup over a can of gel camp fuel.
 I'm not totally disappointed in the coffee maker as it did eventually make a pot of coffee. I'll keep it as a back up for the house should we loose power.
